Description: Los Angeles Canvas examines some of the lesser-known aspects of Los Angeles' social, political and cultural life through a study of its traditional outdoors murals. A tradition inspired by the Civil Rights Movement and the Mexican Mural Movement. These murals have historically advocated for social justice, representing under-examined narratives that contest mainstream history and conveying the community’s cultural identity.
Not everything that glitters is gold, and sometimes, what appears to be a perfect marriage hides a complex web of love, opportunity, and the pursuit of a better life.
Nicky, who enjoys bike rides in the morning when he isn’t working, discovers one day that his bike has been stolen. He must track down his bike in time for his camping trip the next day.

Calvin, a new enrollee in an orphanage is greeted by Jesse and Frank. The three soon form a bond of brotherhood that could never be broken - until Jesse and Frank are adopted by a wealthy family. 20 years later the brothers are reunited through unforeseen circumstances and they immediately realize that a lot has changed. Now the brothers are faced with the dilemma of how to coexist.
An upcoming movie by Chris Escorrega and Thomas Petahtegoose

Few artists embody boundless creativity quite like Lindsey Stirling—and now, she brings her visionary seventh album Duality to life on one of the world’s most iconic stages. Filmed from the legendary Royal Albert Hall, this one-night-only event is more than a concert: it's a full-scale live production, a cinematic homage to the sonic and emotional journey of Duality. Known for her genre-bending virtuosity on electronic violin and high-octane choreography, Lindsey conjures an immersive experience that fuses music, dance, and storytelling.
Love. Guns. Spaceships.
After losing her best friend Yue to depression, Joy struggles to celebrate his first birthday without him, reflecting on their past, she desperately tries to only remember the good things.

One year after a tragic accident, three kids connect to investigate a police proclaimed “suicide”, but as they uncover more and more information, it turns out that the case is a part of something way bigger.

Film_title: Die Konfrontation - TikTok, die mächtigste App der Welt
Description: TikTok’s overwhelming success also carries political weight: As the world’s most downloaded app, it challenges American tech giants and intensifies the rivalry between the two global leaders in digital development—the U.S. and China. How is Washington responding? Can it protect its dominance in the media landscape?
AYT Senior present a complete performance of Alice Birch's [BLANK]
After a near fatal car crash, Allen (Dean McBain) must find help while being pursued by a mysterious figure.
Popeye gets paired up with some of the most powerful anime characters, who wins?
A young woman finds love with an older man, which leads her down a path she never could have imagined.

The real-life account of an Irish Republican Army member who wound up being sentenced to death by his own side. In the 1970s, Brendan Hughes from County Tyrone planned jail breaks and bank robberies for the IRA. But when he stole for his own benefit, he found himself being hunted by the police, army and gunmen from the IRA. After spending long spells in prison, he began to question the use of violence. He now calls for a forum to hear the truth about the Northern Ireland Troubles, in which more than 3,500 people were killed. (BBC)

Film_title: Story Pole: Indigenous Veterans and the Tallest Totem in the World
Description: Story Pole: Indigenous Veterans and the Tallest Totem in the World, delves into its intriguing history and significance, particularly focusing on the war memorial plaque at its base dedicated to British Columbia Indigenous veterans who served in the world wars.

Four men gather for cards and cognac after the death of a close friend. What begins as a fellowship becomes raw confessions of infidelity, betrayal, guilt, and loss, forcing each man to speak their truth while strengthening their brotherhood.

A key figure in modern folk rock, Amy Macdonald captivates audiences with her haunting melodies and unique voice. Her sixth album, Is This What You've Been Waiting For?, continues her musical odyssey. On stage, the singer exudes boundless energy and irresistible charm.

Film_title: A Very Don't Get Out Christmas
Description: A man attempts to escape from a perpetual Christmas in North Carolina. Along the way he is chased by skeletons, dinosaurs, sharks, birds, buses, and whatever else falls out of the sky.

Director: Julien Roserens, Bryan Smith et al
Description: Ghost Resorts is about absence, in places where skiers once frolicked freely. Those moments of joyful laughter on the slopes have been replaced by a mysterious sense of emptiness. But the skiing remains, still. “the Ghost Resorts series is an exploration of the ski culture, of an heritage, a golden age, those places where there was life, that have closed, but where skiing still remains”
War. Bloodshed. Betrayal. The Father's territory will be claimed at any cost.

On the cessation of Covid, 30-year-old twin sisters give up their big city dreams to return home and navigate the challenges of starting a new career, living with their parents and reimagining their future.

Film_title: Vanessa Wagner & Friends @ Paris Sur Mesure
Description: Pianist Vanessa Wagner joins forces with circus artist Chloé Moglia, choreographer Kader Attou, dancers from the Accrorap company and set designers from Collectif Scale to bring Philip Glass's Piano Etudes to life.
‘JMG: The Movie’ is a low-budget comedy-drama starring Jade Emjee as she gets hired to work for an upcoming game studio, however. The more she works there, the more the truth gets revealed.
Chainsaw Symphony, a brand new interview with composer Steve Jablonsky for The Texas Chainsaw Massacre 4K release
Leaving a broken marriage and finding a job at a motel could be the best thing that's happened to Marion in years. Disturbing phone messages however soon begin to threaten her sanity.

Film_title: Octomum: The World's Most Hated Woman?
Description: The extraordinary and polarising story of Nadya Suleman, mother to octuplets.

After a suicidal spell destroys their home world, three legendary wizards — Balthazar the Blue, Fasgrin the Green, and Radovan the Red — escape to Earth. Stripped of their status and limited in magical power, the trio faces a new challenge: navigating modern life. From failing at odd jobs to accidentally committing crimes, their attempts to blend in only make things worse. Just when all hope seems lost, a random act of kindness restores their spirits... only for them to immediately blow it on alcohol and junk food. What follows is a chaotic series of misadventures, culminating in their arrest and a hilariously awkward jailbreak. With no clue how to thrive on Earth, they have only one thing keeping them going — each other... sort of.

At the centre of 'The Presidency' is a Nigerian raised abroad who returns home to face a nation on edge. His mother, a powerful leader in the UPM party, is entangled in a battle against Progress Circle, a rising force threatening to upend the system. As he navigates family legacies and political tensions, he is drawn into a world of deception, ambition, and patriotism.
Adopted into a world of wealth, a teenager discovers her lavish Dubai mansion is a gilded cage and must risk everything to fight for her freedom.
Growing old isn't a choice. Growing up is.
A 99-year-old World War II veteran embarks on a quest to solve a missing-in-action case from 1944.

Dallas artist Malik Schaefer, also known as Code, is a rising star in the underground rap scene. Although his checkered past has led him down the wrong road at times, with the help of his best friend, Styles, Malik is back on the fast-track to success. That is, until he reconnects with the dangerous love of his life, Sophia Ortega, who threatens to destroy it all. Malik must decide to either follow his heart or live by the code that has served him well for many years: family over everything.

In the Hands of Fate follows a hit man who must hunt down a witness he previously spared after she steals money from a dangerous drug kingpin. However, the witness seeks out an old friend for help who has since joined a cult. When the worlds of gangsters and cultists collide, everyone's life is In the Hands of Fate.—Samuel L. Fronsman
Shayne Smith returns with his wildest story yet, involving bombs, FBI mix ups, kangaroo fights, and a ridiculous journey to clear his name and secure a work visa for his sold out Australian tour.
Separated by death, reunited by destiny
Two childhood friends, now adults, rekindle their shared passion for cinema and embark on an adventure of a lifetime as they discover the woes of production and integrity.

Film_title: The Fearless Flyers // Live in Italy
Description: The Fearless Flyers give a funky performance live in Italy.
The journey to the other side of paradise. A scripted movie created within the game of 'Rust.'
Virtual party for stn's 26th birthday.

Set in a remote hill region, the story traces the lives of villagers facing environmental and social challenges. As tensions rise over land and survival, collective action becomes essential. The narrative highlights resilience shaped by landscape, community, and change.

Film_title: Fears is a fluke Tears is the root
Description: James is looking for his wife after finding letters she left behind. He stops by a town and meets a few bizarre characters changing his life forever.
An elderly woman is approached by a salesman who attempts to manipulate her into signing a contract.
In a dark, rural comedy, four friends face macabre setbacks (hiding a corpse, outwitting a scheming daughter, and thwarting a son-in-law's plans) to protect their secret.
Kyle invites girlfriend Eve to try polyamory, leading them to Iris, a free spirit with a dark past. Their initial chemistry evolves into an obsessive situation filled with complications.

After their son is kidnapped by a powerful trafficking ring and escapes, a father seeks vigilante justice against the perpetrators, risking everything as he faces both corrupt officials and dangerous criminals.
When Wayne got diagnosed with Dysphonia, Wayne and his brother Franklin got a promotion for missions that would consider it done.
A Little Robot is late to the task of saving the human race. But with an undead hoard of monsters migrating to a Survival Camp, 8PD3 has no choice but to try to redeem himself...

When Figitec's powerful CEO, Henry Phillips is found unresponsive in his office, a murder investigation rocks the company. As secrets unravel and motives multiply, one question haunts them all-who wanted Henry dead...and why?
When the king dies and his corpse vanishes—stolen by the fleeing queen—the kingdom must recover the body before sunset to complete a sacred ritual and crown a new ruler, or face an ancient curse.
The Puppeteers is inspired by real events, exposing the hidden world of transnational repression. What we see today is likely just the tip of the iceberg.
Bolu, a new mother, struggles with her mental health after the birth of her second child. She is plagued by vivid visions and hallucinations that threaten to destroy her grip on reality.
Continuing the tradition from the previous year, the senior class of KTA is interviewed about their journeys of faith and resilience, and the impact the school had on their lives.

Film_title: The New Adventures of Pinkus the Pink Elephant The Ruins Within
Description: A short animated film.
A group of friends throw a party in celebration of their friend who died one year prior. Conflicts arise when people are unable to control their feelings.

Film_title: Giovanna d'Arco - Teatro Regio di Parma
Description: France 1429. Giovanna appears as a prophetic figure while the French are in the throes of the 100 Years War against the English. After a dream, Carlo is inspired to seek a sanctuary near Rouen where he meets Giovanna, who predicts the end of France’s suffering. Her father, Giacomo, believing she is possessed, attempts to turn her over to the English. After her capture, Giacomo realises his mistake and frees her. Giovanna leads the French to victory but pays the ultimate price.
Three special operatives infiltrate a haunted house to retrieve the senator's daughter who has gone missing.

Two sisters go on a senior trip to Mexico, led by Ava's boyfriend Trent. Meanwhile, journalist Jessica Vandross is going to the same Mexican town in search of her sister's killer after escaping a sex trafficking ring. These stories collide, in a thrilling fight for their lives.
A pest control specialist is taken hostage by a serial killer.

Film_title: SJL The Movie: The Final Mission 2
Description: It's the week before the Little Einsteins' 20th birthday. After the disaster that happened last year, we don't know if there will be a party this year after the Little Einsteins' parties were ruined every year. Then June gets kidnapped by Mr. Gonsin as he is working on a special present for the Little Einsteins when October 9th comes. Will Leo & his team defeat Mr. Gonsin & his gang before October 9th?

Film_title: Daniel Trifonov Shostakovich Festival in Leipzig
Description: Fifty years after the death of Dmitri Shostakovich, the Gewandhaus in Leipzig is paying tribute to one of the most played composers of the 20th century with a festival entirely dedicated to him. The programme for the opening concert in the futuristic setting of the Great Hall includes the Piano Concerto No. 2 in F major, with Daniil Trifonov as soloist, and the Symphony No. 4 in C minor.
Two boys are afflicted by a disease beyond reality.

Parov Stelar didn't just create electro-swing, he elevated it to an art form. For 20 years, the Austrian producer and designer has been combining the vintage charm of the 1920s with contemporary rhythms. His rich sound and energetic stage presence are perfectly suited to the intimate atmosphere of the Baloise Session.
A fading star battles her agent over typecasting, while an obsessed young fan begins stalking her—blurring admiration into something dangerous.

Tuntunlade, a breakout star on the cusp of fame. But when a man who once helped launch her career makes an impossible demand of her and she refuses to play along, a broader web of complicity begins to unravel.

Zoltán Huszárik is one of the great unsung masters of international cinema. With an output that comprised just two features and a handful of remarkable short films, his unique and beautifully realised works set him apart from all other contemporary filmmakers, creating an intoxicating body of work unlike any other in modern cinema. his special edition 3-disc Blu-ray box set contains his two features Szindbád and Csontváry, plus five of his acclaimed, rarely seen short works - including his most renowned film poem, Elégia - presented from new 4K restorations and released for the first time ever on Blu-ray. With this release, one of Hungary’s best-kept cinematic secrets finally has a chance to flourish.

Tom swore he’d never have kids. That didn’t work out. But what a time to do it! Climate change, reality collapse, performative ideology, narcissism and hyper consumption. At least the kid’s poems are going to be multi-layered. Ward takes us on the journey becoming a dad has been taking him, re-tracing his own childhood and teenage years with fundamentalist Christian parents, how he used action films to build his image of masculinity and how to feel about bringing a child into a world you’ve been saying “we’re f**ked!” since he was 7. A bittersweet hour of all that makes life heaven and hell.
An unhappily married man, sneaks out of the house to go on a date with his college crush and ends up having the night from hell.
Two teens sneak into a church to hold a funeral for their guinea pig.
A woman takes a shower.

Film_title: Alain Altinoglu conducts Shostakovich Symphony no.8
Description: The Frankfurt Radio Symphony Orchestra performs Dmitri Shostakovich's Symphony No. 8. The extraordinary gravity of the Eighth marks a new high in conductor Alain Altinoglu undertaking of the complete discography.
Judai and Juna narrate and investigate 26 days of 26 lost films about Manchuria.

Surgery isn't a miracle-- it's torture. Do we dare to stare back at the horror of the medical gaze? Or do we keep blaming the disabled body as the classic freak? The violence is deep, yet the record is so easy to hide. The patient must be eternally grateful to be torn apart with such expertise.
A knockoff “Make-A-Wish” foundation grants a young girl's dying wish: for her mum to die too and join her in heaven.

In 1935 Erwin Schrodinger placed comedian Jason Byrne in a venue with an audience and closed the doors. Was there a show or NO SHOW? For those outside without tickets there was simultaneously a show and NO SHOW. Don’t be outside. Watch the master of comic creativity and audience interaction create a show from NO SHOW.

Film_title: Jack Hunter's Paranoia Tapes: The Movie
Description: When a mysterious set of dvd's surfaces, on the front door of YouTuber's Clyde's front porch, The Jack he knows becomes a suspect with each segment more disturbing than the last, who is Henry, who is chase and who is Jack Hunter?
Years ago, Esther encountered a mysterious figure and something happened, she didn't realize her wants in life were granted, but the figure has now returned to collect payment for what she was given.
Three friends are looking to score with beautiful women and have a relaxing day on the water when their day takes an unexpected turn.

Film_title: March of the Black Hussars: Viennese Operetta in America
Description: Why would Gilded Age audiences flock to theaters in American cites to see a Viennese operetta that celebrated German nationalism and militarism? A team of University of Tampa faculty and students from the disciplines of history, music, and musical theater set out to answer this question. Local filmmaker Steven Nye followed the project, which culminated in a live performance of songs from Carl Millöcker’s The Black Hussar. Filmed at the historic Tampa Theatre, the reenactment uses the libretto, stage manager’s notes, and the conductor’s score from the original American production to bring this forgotten work back to life, and commentary from the UTampa research team explains why the musical comedy spent over a decade at the center of U.S. popular culture.

Film_title: Let's Make It a Blockbuster Night
Description: An experimental feature film.
A grandfather`s unwavering determination to take the SPM examination in memory of his deceased grandchild, who tragically passed away before he could sit for his own exam.

A vacation planet, Tranquamilia, suffers from a mind-control device broadcasting rage, turning its populace into aggressive beasts. With the TARDIS working perfectly, the Doctor and Peri decide to take a holiday. But where? A long-forgotten piece of equipment in the TARDIS storage locker sends them to the peaceful and idyllic continent of Armelia - home of the Doctor’s old friend Ravlos. But the land where they emerge is far from peaceful. A hate ray is regularly sweeping Armelia, turning its inhabitants into savage beasts, and there is only one place it can originate - the planet Tranquamilia's other continent, home of Armeila's old enemies, the Tranquillons. Or is that the only place? Because somewhere far above the planet events are watched by the slimy super-salesman, Mordant, who has his own unscrupulous plans.

Quinn and Lacey play beer pong and discuss Lacey's recent breakup with Edward. Their friends Kai and Desmond join them from playing pool inside, and the mood shifts when Desmond reveals new information.

Film_title: Malena Ernman: Terra Mater Bayreuth Baroque 2025
Description: In their concert Terra Mater, leading figures on the early music scene Christina Pluhar and her ensemble L'Arpeggiata celebrate Mother Nature with Swedish mezzo-soprano Malena Ernman. Vocal and instrumental art intertwine with delight until they merge, evoking not only the exuberance of Baroque nature, but also its fragility. A conceptual concert rich in associations.

A Knight, scarred by his past of violence, wanders aimlessly in search of a 50,000 bounty reward. Along his journey he encounters a painter, who helps the knight discover his true connection to artistry.

After being injured alone in his garage, a man is left trapped, disoriented, and unable to see. He only needs to move about 15 feet but he’s hurt, he’s immobilized he’s in complete darkness. Confined to a single space and driven by physical limitation and psychological pressure, IN DARKNESS turns a simple situation into an intense fight for survival — where every movement matters and darkness itself becomes the enemy.

Film_title: Penistone Film Festival Matt Walters Organ Concert
Description: Journey through the years with acclaimed organist Matt Walters as he performs on the Compton Organ at Downside Abbey

Alessa is a worldly and highly successful real estate agent at the height of her career. The only thing that's missing in her life is love. With a tumultuous divorce behind her, she ventures back to the Philippines to attend her 40-year class reunion. During her trip, an unexpected encounter with her childhood crush ignites a whirlwind of emotions and obstacles, sending Alessa on a quest of rediscovery, passion, and what it means to give love unconditionally.

The Lucerne Festival Orchestra and its music director Riccardo Chailly dedicate an evening to Sergei Rachmaninoff, with Italian pianist Beatrice Rana shining in the highly virtuosic variations of the Rhapsody on a Theme of Paganini. Also on the programme is the mysterious Symphony No. 1 and The Rock, an early work that already gives a glimpse of the Russian composer's musical sensibility.

Wrong flowers, a Macedonian palm reader, a cunning brother, a village romance, a strange anecdote, a careless friend, a delayed flight... Through a series of quirky, comedic, and endlessly witty situations, Luka, Ellie, Kole and Gala try to figure out what true love really is. And is there a better place for such a story than Belgrade?

Director: Matthew Jackman, Aidan Reggio et al
Description: RayMan, Moneyshot, and Number 7 must come back together once again after years to stop The Creator from shattering the galaxy
A drama feature film.
A young man from an impoverished background studies to become a doctor in Germany.
A lonely woman looks for Halloween inspiration, but one unexpected guest turns her quiet night into pure horror.

A captivating documentary exploring the world of second hand stores from the point of view of their owners and consumers. A community striving for a circular economy and a brighter future. It explores a more sustainable way of shopping and the lives it touches throughout it. From recycling to employing people with disability to fighting against homelessness, this documentary attempts to showcase the good done throughout their efforts for more sustainable practices.
The day of my life and routine in short cut

Film_title: WE ARE THE MOST BEAUTIFUL PEOPLE
Description: A groundbreaking documentary film that challenges societal norms, exploring the profound themes of ableism, racism, intersectionality, and the distinction between Disability Rights and Disability Justice.
A short student film.

Jai Faustus, an overworked associate at Underworld Enterprises, finds himself face to face with his toughest client yet, Lillian Reithwin, the entitled and morally bankrupt corporate lawyer who storms in mere moments after the office closes. Desperate to protect her spotless legal record, Lillian demands a deal, but her outrageous requests leave Jai in a professional and moral dilemma. As Lillian's shenanigans ensue, he finds himself wondering which of the two is the real devil.
Mixtape composed of clips from horror films and real shock material

Pharaohplex Productions is excited to unveil "No Service," an exhilarating time travel adventure currently being shot entirely in the charming towns of Hamilton and Corvallis, Montana. This film will follow a young girl from the future who will find herself unexpectedly transported to the 1990s in a quaint town. With a storyline that blends futuristic thrills with nostalgic small-town life, "No Service" features the vibrant involvement of local community members who are helping bring this Montana-made masterpiece to life. Prepare to be captivated by a unique blend of past and future—"No Service" coming soon.

The story of St Patrick and his extraordinary mission from Roman Britain to Ireland to spread the Christian faith 1,500 years ago. In a challenge to the conventional narrative, this places British-born Patrick in his European context and shows how Ireland’s patron saint was part of a radical Christian movement that converted, not only the Irish at the edge of the earth, but also large swathes of Europe, to Christianity.

Tim and Cathryn are a couple in their early 40's. They haven't really gotten anywhere in life - no career, no college, no direction, no ambition and no kids... And now that the biological clock is ticking they have decided that the most important thing for them is to have a baby. In a desperate bid to save their dream of parenthood, Tim secretly agrees to drive the getaway car for a bank robbery to raise the money for IVF. But chaos ensues when Cathryn calls demanding he come home immediately to try to conceive. Tim faces an impossible choice: fulfill his promise as the getaway driver or rush home to keep their baby-making schedule.

In the wake of the ban on women's football in 2014, the national team in Pakistan faced an uncertain and turbulent period. Despite immense cultural barriers, these determined players had fought for their place both on and off the field. The ban disrupted their progress, pushing players to seek alternative income sources and abandon their dreams. After 8 long years, in 2020, FIFA's intervention led to the formation of a normalisation committee, marking a fresh start for the team. Her Right to Play follows the journey of these athletes to the Olympic qualifiers. Fraught with intense training, struggling with injuries and with a desire to prove themselves, the story follows the women’s grit and determination in service of the sport and the flag.

Film_title: The Ugly Duckling: Birds of a Feather
Description: The 3rd installment of The Ugly Duckling films by Tristan Bennett of Bennett Studios. Plot TBA. Set to release sometime in 2027.

George, a heroin-addicted chess hustler who sleeps in the park outside of the Section 8 housing where 12-year-old Vivienne lives, helps her prepare for a screen test through street schemes as twisted rehearsals, forging a unique bond built on chaos.
After a night out, Olivia (Gillian Garvie) calls Stephen (Benjamin Jorgensen) for a ride home and to reconnect after an accident.
An isolated singer-songwriter rediscovers his voice when a chance romance with a shy nursing student inspires them to create a life-changing song – opening doors they never imagined.
Humiliated by her best friend and ex-fiancé's affair, Summer seeks revenge by sabotaging their honeymoon, but her plan unravels.
A horror short film.

Film_title: Rick Wakeman: The Return of the Caped Crusader Part 2
Description: Legendary prog-rock pianist and composer Rick Wakeman, alongside The English Rock Ensemble, perform two iconic solo-albums back-to-back - The Six Wives of Henry VIII (1973), and The Myths and Legends of King Arthur and the Knights of the Round Table (1975).
An independent filmmaker is hired to shoot surveillance footage of an unknown purpose for a mysterious client, leading to a conversation about the relationship between cinema and surveillance.
An alien-obsessed young man watches his dreams of first contact turn into a nightmare after his slacker flatmate brings home an otherworldly discovery.

A fiercely independent, anti-Big Tech film drama told through a Radiohead-esque song-track, challenging our relationship to screens in every frame. A family's encounter with addictions to technology and social media takes a dark turn when a new immersive product enters their lives. Tim Arnold's debut film drama is a self-scored sci-fi 'screen album'. A feature length silent film set to 12 interlocking songs from the nationally acclaimed album of the same name. An experimental satire about big tech’s colonisation of our lives.

The rookie lawyer, Bandaley, exposed a corruption case. The CEO of the law firm where he worked, Keller, was suspected of embezzling the client's inheritance. Keller bribed the witness, Carolyn, to give false testimony and was acquitted. The media portrayed Bandaley as a person who used the Whistleblower Act to blackmail his employer. Besides being unemployed, Bandaley also suffered from a rare mental illness: word substitution disorder. He couldn't talk to people using the correct vocabulary and even spoke foul language, so he began to avoid contact with anyone. One day, Carolyn was suddenly killed. Her ex-husband presumed that she was silenced for giving false testimony. If it was confirmed that the judgment back then was a miscarriage of justice, it could not only clear Bandaley's name but also convict Keller. Bandaley had to take the witness stand that he feared the most again and be interrogated repeatedly under the watchful eyes of the media and the public.
An emotionally scarred college freshman goes on a killing spree to feed a monster that was once his father.

Nicole has just had the night of her life with the guy of her dreams, everything is perfect. Until Jon proposes and Nicole accepts. After having a change of heart about the newly found whirlwind romance, Jon is hell bent on showing Nicole that 'til Death do us part' is more than words.
Book critic and writer Dwight Garner shares his recipe for an unlikely, delightful sandwich.
Tempted by her desire to maintain her heterosexual facade, a lost 25-year-old must decide between taking life-altering gay conversion pills or accepting her love.
The full tour doc, with all episodes combined & some unseen footage.

Film_title: Billy Joel Jr. The Live film
Description: Billy Joel Jr. Live at Sleeping Village in Chicago Illinois

Dive into the beguiling world of John Field's Nocturnes as interpreted by world-renowned pianist Alice Sara Ott. This film, directed by filmmaker and tenor Andrew Staples, immerses viewers in Alice's imagination and her connection to Field's music, offering a rare glimpse into the artist's mind during the creative process. The interplay between historical venues and the custom-designed digital landscapes at Munich's Hyperbowl LED studio creates an atmosphere where the intangible becomes vividly real, resulting in a film that is much more than just a performance; it is an exploration of a performer's journey through the music of a neglected composer who left the world one of its most beloved musical forms: the nocturne.
A commercial driver and his assistant's lives spiral into chaos after the assistant sells a passenger's forgotten phone.
This is the story of the unknown legends that shaped our music world

REHEARSALS FOR THE END is a video installation by artist André Severo, which brings together 36 television monitors – of different sizes, models and formats – with short loops of scenes of atomic bomb explosions in the Second World War or in tests during the Cold War.

Film_title: Gravity Bach Complete performance of works for organ - Vol. 1
Description: An exceptional event took place from 31 October to 1 November 2025 in St Thomas Church in Leipzig, where Bach was cantor: Johannes Lang performed the complete organ works of his illustrious predecessor. The 22-hour programme followed the liturgical year. The works in this first part celebrate Advent and Christmas.

Belgian collective NAFT set the ESNS festival alight with their fearsome blend of brass and electro. A real siren call in honour of the glorious release of celebration that's almost impossible to resist.

Film_title: Yerevan Youth Symphony Orchestra @ Young Euro Classic 2025
Description: An invitation to a musical voyage. Armenia, with a virtuoso trumpet concerto, Norway, with character studies, and the call of America - or nostalgia for Bohemia - with Dvořák's Ninth. The Yerevan Youth Symphony Orchestra is galvanised by Sergueï Smbatyan's direction and accompanies trumpeter Sergueï Nakariakov.

Film_title: European Union Youth Orchestra @ Young Euro Classic 2025
Description: For 26 years now, this group of young musicians from all over the European Union has been delighting audiences at the Young Euro Classic festival. It's a project that illustrates the vitality of our continent's musical life. In the first half of the evening, Spanish cellist Pablo Ferrández performs Shostakovich's Cello Concerto No. 1.
For ARTE Concert's Piano Day, Christian Löffler and Meredi combine their talents for the first time in a live setting. An exclusive collaboration unveiled on the LAB stage in Nantes.

Film_title: Melody Gardot à l’Olympia - The Essential Tour

Description: A paranoid young woman receives dark visions of harm befalling her best friend.

Norwegian conductor Tabita Berglund leads the Frankfurt Radio Symphony Orchestra in Anna Thorvaldsdottir's Archora, Wagner's Prelude to Tristan and Isolde, and Sibelius' Seventh Symphony. In the first half, Julian Steckel performs Shostakovich's Cello Concerto No. 1.

Thirty-year-old LaDonne, a hotel housekeeper and single mother of twins, fights to stay sober and stable. When job loss and family strain push her to a breaking point and arrest, rehab offers a chance at redemption. Guided by a counselor and a kind stranger, LaDonne begins to heal. Her brave performance at a Christmas event becomes a turning point, rebuilding dreams and finding hope.

Imprinted is a journey into the world of choreographer JoAnna Mendl Shaw, whose work with dancers and horses reveals a choreographic language that redefines how we connect to animals, to one another, and to ourselves.

A quantum physics student must fight for his life and the girl he loves when he discovers the universe is governed by 7 parallel timelines and her estranged ex-boyfriend is out to kill her in every single one.

Film_title: The Seven Trumpets Blow on Tuesday
Description: Clifford Hughes receives inconvenient news.
Devastated after losing the love of his life, the lone, isolated youth Adam embarks on a dark and twisted odyssey of self love and acceptance that asks... Is this really what love looks like?
We conduct a unique experiment - putting Andrew 'on trial' with a real judge and jury.

Toonami: Vindication is a home movie I compiled. It is essentially a comprehensive cut of Adult Swim Toonami's Total Immersion Events in film format. I put this together because there isn't any physical media for them and likely never will be. Of course, I DO NOT own the rights for Toonami, so I'm unable to upload the movie itself. However, I would still like to keep a logue of this project for my personal Letterboxd.
In a deceptive world where manipulation erodes trust, a selfish choice sparks consequences that expose the brutal cost of survival.
A hitchhiking artist travels back to his home town.

After losing his job, his father and custody of his child, Kareem has enough of being dealt a bad card in life and decides to take control in the most brutal way he can, by kidnapping his boss's daughter and holding her hostage where if a life changing amount of money is not paid within four hours she will be killed. Little does he know, the four hour journey, a night ride in and out of London, will induce a bond of empathy for one another that spirals the events of the night further into madness and anarchy.
A man tries to reverse his fate after dreaming about his own death.

Film_title: Hollywood Gala II - Award Night at the Symphony
Description: Music is a crucial element in every Oscar-winning film. In this album you will be taken on a musical journey through the sounds of the greatest Oscar winners of all time, from classics like Casablanca and Citizen Kane to monumental cinematic works like The Godfather - blockbusters with soundtracks that for almost a century have made us shudder, melt and cry in the darkness of the cinema. The Danish National Symphony Orchestra, Danish National Concert Choir, solo singers and hosts are ready on stage to bring these classics and blockbusters to life with Music from Robin Hood, James Bond, The Mission, Apocalypse Now, Breakfast at Tiffany’s, Dances with Wolves and more. We don't watch films with our eyes only, but also with our ears. Music elevates the story, brings the characters to life and draws us into the story, and often the notes resonate within us and evoke memories long after the film is over.

Alenka Mali, a 24-year-old raised in Slovenia and born in Argentina, grew up immersed in the outdoors, guided by her parents, both acclaimed climbers. After moving to Canada, she embraced freeride snowboarding and met her partner, Spencer, who introduced her to the world of BASE jumping, sparking a new dream — to combine her passions by attempting a snowboard BASE jump off Goat Mountain in Squamish, BC.

The untold story of one of the most influential cities in the history of music. From 1920 until today Kansas City has influenced music. Beginning in the 1920s with the evolution of Jazz and Blues from prohibition. In the 1960s and 70's a center for Folk music at the Vanguard Coffeehouse. The cultivation of the KC Sound by bands like Seasons to Risk, Frogpond and The Get Up Kids. Across Troost Avenue hip hop artists like Tech N9ne, Rich the Factor and Mac Lethal were making names Across the country and establishing Kansas City as a force in music.

The city is leaving, slowly casting off, on the edge of time... It is leaving lightly... Not so far away, elsewhere, where time passes, has passed, will pass, on the horizon of time... The image glides on its path, a paper cargo ship, daughter of oblivion, free of history. It passes like a cloud, a dead leaf... A few stones remain, marked by vague eternity. A voice passes, from time to time, from distant memory... An ancient traveller? A distracted vagabond? It stands far away, in the rolling of time, silent.

Dexter’s life falls apart after a false theft accusation costs him his job. Desperate, he starts a taxi business, unknowingly picking up David—a man unraveling after his girlfriend leaves him. As David spirals into crime, Dexter is pulled into a deadly web, while detectives race to uncover the truth.
A young waitress is abducted by a religious cult, who are hell-bent on curing her from a sexually transmitted werewolf virus or killing her in the process. She must escape before the first full moon.

Facing mounting financial troubles, Draven's marriage to Adam teeters on the brink of collapse. When her wealthy former lover, Ceceilius, reenters her life, passions and rivalries ignite, pulling them all into a dangerous game of desire, deception, and unforeseen consequences

Film_title: Robben Ford with the Frankfurt Radio Big Band
Description: American Robben Ford started out playing jazz saxophone because he admired Paul Desmond. But he soon swapped this instrument for an electric guitar. A few years later, Musician magazine named him one of the 100 best guitarists of the 20th century. Big names in jazz, rock and pop, including Joni Mitchell, Jimmy Witherspoon, Miles Davis, Bill Evans and Bob Dylan, asked him to join their bands.

Daryl, Matt, and Tammy are three siblings who never quite grew up. But when they are about to be evicted from their apartment, they find themselves in the middle of a slippery heist. If they can pull it off, they'll solve their money problems, and maybe even save Christmas in the process.

The name Tarta Relena conjures up images of a traditional Catalan pastry. In concert, their sensual, crystal-clear voices oscillate effortlessly between futuristic sounds and traditional Catalan harmonies; a refined experimental music that has the flavour of a mystical experience.

Vignettes and small moments documenting my two daughters on the cusp of adolescence. Gestures, glances, clothing, accessories, costumes, trinkets and play-acting—perhaps the only visible elements of an otherwise mysterious transitional stage between childhood and teenage years.
A day in the life of Samuel, a man cursed by a witch to turn into a fish everyday.
A monologue from King Robert the Bruce.
Photons light up Nuits Sonores with their hypnotic blend of jazz and techno, covering a lot of ground with their debut album La Nuit sans l'ennui.

Film_title: Spanish National Youth Orchestra @ Young Euro Classic 2025
Description: A concert featuring Andalusia and Russia, with Isaac Albéniz's Iberia and Stravinsky's The Rite of Spring. A seminal work from the previous century that is more topical than ever, with a new work by Fabià Santkovsky, under the bow of Francisco Fullana. An opportunity for the musicians of the Spanish National Youth Orchestra to express all their talent under the baton of Nuno Coelho.

A former Russian soap opera star, who didn't find the Hollywood dream to be all it's cracked up to be, now runs various scams to survive the LA hustle. When Fate intervenes, she is brought together with a gay theater nerd from the Midwest, and the two form an unlikely bond that turns into a prosperous partnership, changing both of their lives.
Short film created as part of the 48 Hour Film Project.

Dolly is a psychological slasher horror that turns a handmade toy into a vessel for release. Inspired by Seaton's own experience growing up in a predominantly white neighbourhood. The horror short confronts representation and shadows of the past.
A middle aged couple in an open relationship fight over their relationship issues, as their children struggle to tell their parents about their own problems.
Raghavan, a man in his 60s who is bitten by a mysterious creature, forcing him into a tense 24- hour observation period with his distressed granddaughter.

Mark unexpectedly gains incredible powers and confides in his father, setting him on a path toward becoming a superhero. As he embraces his new identity, chaos erupts around him, testing his limits, his morals, and the true meaning of heroism in a world that quickly spirals beyond his control.

Film_title: The Cringy Life Of A Replaceable Kid
Description: After the school shooting at “Positive Thinking High School”, a socially awkward boy and a teen model drift together into his eccentric mother’s world--pulling them into a tangle of humiliation, absurd beliefs, and questionable life lessons.
A postman finds tranquillity in the monotonous lifestyle his job creates as he encounters and reflects on his role in society.
A poignant exploration of one man’s journey to break the violent chains of intergenerational trauma.

Meera, a talented and ambitious young actress from a middle-class family, has always been driven to succeed in the film industry. Growing up, she was inspired by her father, a drama artist who tragically passed away in an accident. Despite her mother's concerns and her boyfriend's disapproval, Meera decides to follow in her father's footsteps.

Opening his heart to love was not on the cards for Paul. But will the new resident in town, Claire, show Paul how? Or will Claire’s vindictive ex-husband destroy not only Claire’s new business, but hers and Paul’s second chance at love?
A short documentary.
A narrative short film.

Join Ericka Nicole Malone in 'The Bucket Wish,' a documentary that follows her personal quest to live the life she always imagined. This film captures her journey as she revisits her dreams and confronts the fears that once held her back.
A school project, this horror-comedy pits an unwitting student against a message carrying creep.
Visual album by the experimental musician WAREHOUSE UNION exploring themes of Buddhism and world travel through video collage.

A suspenseful and adventurous journey of a courageous black woman with the fear of rain, known as ombrophobia. As she seeks solace from her troubled past, fate intertwines her life with an enigmatic white man, torn by his own demons and on a quest for redemption.

Film_title: The Satan Sellers - Beatrice Sparks and the Birth of the Satanic Panic
Description: While the Satanic Panic reached its peak in the 1980s and 1990s, its origins go back a decade earlier, with a backlash against the Age of Aquarius, fear of RPGs and heavy metal, and a series of hysterical books led by a grubby work of fiction masquerading as a true memoir, written by a shameless fraud.
Giving up the Ghost, a newly filmed interview with actor Gary Frank
A Josiah Gonzalez Film

Film_title: The Legend of Nigel Kneale: Enemy From Space
Description: Blending expert testimony with newly contextualised archive, Enemy from Space reveals how Kneale’s ideas about authority, alienation and technological dread still ripple through today’s genre cinema and TV. The result is a concluding chapter that’s both celebration and re-appraisal. designed to cap the Hammer box set with a thoughtful, contemporary perspective on a towering, sometimes misunderstood figure.

Ginelle is captain of D team and she is intent on winning. But Ginelle's leadership style does not bring out the best in her team, and when talent scouts come to view their game, Ginelle is forced to re-evaluate what winning really means.

The Louds are headed to Europe, where they'll attend a knighting ceremony in London, search for the world's best pizza in Italy, spend a night in a creepy castle in Transylvania, ski the Swiss alps, and time-travel to ancient Greece!

After losing his sister, Itoro seeks a peaceful life by the beach, but his when Sade mistakenly films the president's son Dare committing murder and finds refuge in Itoro's bar, he must outsmart their pursuers and seek justice.
Depending on how you time a standing ovation, this is roughly one hour and 19 minutes from standing up to sitting down.
Den of Vampires, a newly filmed interview with cinematographer Ernest Dickerson
Eric Allard reveals the secrets behind F/X 2

In Wajdi Mouawad's "brilliantly involving" new Paris Opera production of Debussy's only opera, Pelléas et Mélisande, French soprano Sabine Devieilhe is "as near to perfection as one might wish for: a voice of exquisite beauty and sung as if the role [of Mélisande] had been written especially for her" (Opera Today) and Huw Montague Rendall, as Pelléas, projects a "faultless French phrasing, endowing [Pelléas] with the perfect blend of freshness and candor" (Bachtrack). Based on the classic symbolist play by Maurice Maeterlinck that the composer found to contain "far more humanity" than realism, Pelléas et Mélisande sets a tragic love triangle against some of Debussy's most soaringly dramatic music, all its Wagnerian flourishes brought out by Antonello Manacorda and the Paris Opera Orchestra.

Set against the backdrop of the vibrant yet tumultuous streets, this romantic street drama weaves the lives of two artists; Lyric, scarred by a tragedy of the heart and Da Creepa, masked with the despair of circumstances that comes from displaced loyalty. They embark on a journey where bonds are forged, hidden pains resurface, and poetry serves as a bridge between hearts. Take this journey with these two artists as a chance encounter sparks a romance between Lyric and Da Creepa that neither were anticipating.
A cold-blooded contract killer known only as Bullseye executes without hesitation, due to his rough past.
A narrative film.

MARTY, AN OBITUARY WRITER IN LOS ANGELES, AND HIS BROTHER GEORGE HAVEN’T SPOKEN SINCE THEIR FATHER’S PASSING IN THEIR YOUTH. NOW, NEARLY A DECADE LATER, DEATH UNITES THE TWO AGAIN WHEN MARTY RETURNS HOME FOR HIS MOTHER’S FUNERAL.

SHOT ON A IPHONE. A high school student’s resistance to learning Spanish turns the classroom into a battleground of frustration, humor, and unexpected breakthroughs. Struggling with his teachers' traditional methods, he remains stubbornly stuck—until a new instructor arrives with a different approach. Through patience, unconventional teaching, and a refusal to give up, the student begins to see language learning in a new light, even as his own temper threatens to stand in the way. Blending sharp comedy with moments of genuine growth, this film series explores the challenges of mastering something unfamiliar—without ever feeling like a lesson. It’s a story of perseverance, perspective shifts, and the unexpected ways we learn beyond the classroom.
A girl entering an arranged marriage speaks with her piano tutor, who had escaped one years earlier.
26 days of 26 lost films about the UNITEDST.

Kah Bee Chow's 𝑭𝒓𝒐𝒏𝒅𝒔 (2025) focuses on the walled enclosure of her family home, and uses archival footage to process her father's passing. In the work, his garden becomes a mnemonic device and the camera a technology that enacts a form of touch. In the absence of a conventional protagonist, grief provokes a rhythm of sensual close-ups and textual interludes.

Director: Micheal Kraft, Oliver Dauer et al
Description: At the age of 24, Sicilian Alberto d'Ascola decided to move to Jamaica to get closer to reggae and his roots. Over the years, he has established himself and won respect in the very place where the music was born.

Pooja was the apple of her father's eye,the only daughter of wealthy businessman Malhotra.She had everything she could ever wish for except the freedom to choose who she loved.She had fallen for Akshay,the son of one of her father's worker
Claustrophobic and the horror of being trapped alive in a box.

Since it was founded in Barcelona in 2015 by ten female wind musicians, the Balkan Paradise Orchestra has established itself in a field traditionally reserved for men. These ten Spanish artists deliver a refreshing performance combining traditional Balkan fanfare and dance music and have already toured at festivals all over the world. Here they thrill the audience at Nuremberg's Bardentreffen in 2025.

Multi-instrumentalist Warren Wolf and the Frankfurt Radio Big Band, conducted by Dary James Argue, present Grand Vibes. A number of tracks are taken from Warren Wolf's album History of the Vibraphone (2024), a fine demonstration of the eclecticism and virtuosity of this internationally acclaimed musician.

This film is about a child living in a tent whose candle blows out in a gust of wind. He doesn’t like the dark, so he tries to think what to do. He puts a potato in an empty can and connects a wire. There is a spark, but it quickly goes out. Then he has a better plan. He gets a bicycle and connects the wire to the light. He starts to pedal fast and finally the tent lights up. He is happy! Gazan kids are ingenious!
Peanut Vendors - sometimes they sell, sometimes they help.

Blinded by jealousy, King Leontes falsely accuses his pregnant wife of infidelity, setting into motion a series of catastrophes that will destroy his wife and son and leave his infant daughter abandoned to the elements on a distant island. Sixteen years later, the king receives an unlikely chance at redemption.

When an alpha billionaire CEO hires a lowly street runner to deliver the medicine that will save his life, the street runner enters a world of deception, intrigue, action, and betrayal. Along the way, she discovers a power inside herself.

Analogous Life is the debut feature film by audio/visual artist, Ryan Cooper, produced under Studio Fusique. The story follows a lone hiker who stumbles upon an eerie, abandoned television set deep in the wilderness. This chance discovery unleashes a disorienting, light-speed odyssey across multi-dimensional space and time, plunging the protagonist into a labyrinth of alternate realities and parallel worlds. As the journey unfolds, glimpses of a vast cosmic web emerge, revealing profound interconnections between existence, fate, and the unknown—interwoven with surreal, guardian-like figures such as a watchful owl that hint at deeper mystical guidance.
Take us away.

Film_title: Everybody's Got Something to Hide Except Me and My Monkey
Description: on a Halloween Day, Tim and Tom, annoyed at their dissapointing bananas, meet a gorilla.
A man experiences a series of trials and tribulations.
Two pub regulars trade pints and insults during quiz night, until an unexpected turn shakes up their usual routine. A prequel to Tired Of Experts.

Casey Adams, a 15-year-old girl with a score to settle with a world that’s betrayed her. With the help of an unlikely ally, her path to vengeance is darker and more twisted than anyone could possibly imagine.

Film_title: Chatterbox Sweetheart and the Silent CEO
Description: Nancy lose her memory after a car accident and has newfound love for her mute husband Matthew
From sunset to sunset, everything cycles. In-camera editing, filmed passing the camera to each other during 24 hours on the Isle of Mull.
When her friend goes missing in the woods, Marcia goes searching for her only to come to the horrifying realisation that she is not alone in these woods.
Sadie Finloch disappeared in 1973. What happened?

A fallen journalist seeks redemption through the final interview with Shy, a condemned revolutionary. Their battle of ideals forces her to confront truth, justice, and belief as Shy faces death for her principles.

The conventions of documentary, musical theater, and magical realism are combined and subverted to address issues of personal, national, and artistic identity through the eyes of a composer desperate to pull off one final backer’s audition whilst hounded by a disdainful documentarian named Charon.
After getting married, a man becomes entangled in a perilous love triangle, forcing him to navigate treacherous emotions and hidden secrets.
Ex-MP Luke Burgos flees both law enforcement and mobsters while grappling with existential questions. His survival depends on finding a hacker who can unlock a flash drive everyone's killing for.

oshiSPARK returns to the California beaches with another VTuber summer concert, Virtual Vacation Los Angeles 2025! Come see a 3D concert featuring VTuber guests Nimi Nightmare, Dooby3D, Ashton Marten, and Hyuni
A feature-length fan edit of the 2016 Holbeach Film Company thriller, Dishonoured.

Film_title: Pile Up: World's Biggest Crash Test
Description: In an audacious experiment, unwitting members of the public join a high-speed pile-up as auto experts investigate car safety. Thanks to cutting edge engineering, no one is ever in danger.

While an irate Principal Washington waits for the maintenance man to arrive, the five classmates from different social classes are reluctant to entertain one another. Never crossing paths in high school, the sudden lock-in forces the once jock, nerd, popular girl, teen mom, and delinquent to interact. After a decade of tensions, old beefs resurface, secrets are exposed, and tears are shed as Tia, Nate, Cherry, Jade, and Saint pass time, realizing they aren’t as dissimilar as their statuses projected.
A Story of Endings

The DR Symphony Orchestra breaks the sound barrier and takes you out into the galaxies — to a place between reality and fantasy with soundtracks from Star Wars, The Mandalorian, Star Trek, Dune, and many more. Join the orchestra on the third and final symphonic journey through musical universes and cinematic galaxies — all the way to the outermost asteroids and back to Earth again.. 1. A New Hope 2. Raised By Wolves 3. Rebel Moon 4. Dune (1984) 5. Dune (2021) 6. Star Trek Into Darkness 7. War of the Worlds 8. Valerian and the City of a Thousand Planets 9. Hyperspace 10. Armageddon 11. Rogue One 12. The Book of Boba Fett 13. The Empire Strikes Back 14. Return of the Jedi 15. Revenge of the Sith 16. The Mandalorian 17. The Phantom Menace
Three friends undertake a long cross-country drive on motorbikes, heading from Spain down into the north of Africa.
Each year across Finland, high school students prepare for Wanhat, a traditional dance marking the end of adolescence.

Cast: Fr. Juan Carlos Scannone S. J.
Description: As the world mourns Pope Francis, Mary Kennedy explores his journey from Argentina to the Vatican, examining the key themes that shaped his papacy.

Former police captain Thomas Cooper, once a respected figure, finds himself entangled in a dangerous deal with a notorious crime boss. His involvement leads to a love triangle and ultimately a betrayal. Now, haunted by his past, Thomas must confront the consequences when his son, Christian, becomes a target of the crime boss's revenge.

Film_title: On TV: A Black History Month
Description: Experience a celebration of Black excellence in TV and honor the pioneering legends who transformed the entertainment landscape.

He lost his wife to the Dead, and his daughter to the Chief. Boiled and drenched in sorrow, he will do anything to reach the Rumored 'Susanna Vinyard'. Though his enemies forget one thing. He will stop at nothing for the day of Reckoning.

Warm vibrato, traditional throat singing, body percussion, a thirst for experimentation: Abel Selaocoe is breathing new life into the world of classical music. The cellist is performing this summer at the Rheingau Music Festival in a program entitled “African Roots,” featuring his own compositions and a score by Giovanni Sollima.

Film_title: "Origen. La semilla de los tiempos" Teatro de la Maestranza, Seville
Description: With ‘Origen. La semilla de los tiempos’, the Accademia del Piacere, the Ballet Flamenco de Andalucía and the Teatro de la Maestranza take audiences on a musical dance journey somewhere between tradition and the avant-garde. Baroque music enters into dialogue with flamenco, travelling through the history of Andalusia in a story that gives pride of place to emotion, memory and scenic beauty.

In a career spanning more than twenty years, Dobet Gnahoré's timeless pan-African music has won numerous awards. This recognition and her legendary choreography has made her the queen of Afro-pop and a powerful icon who embodies her native continent on the international stage.

Founded in 2012 out of the Tomorrow's Warriors programme, London quintet the Ezra Collective are now key players on the British music scene. Blending jazz, hip-hop, dub and reggae, the music of this British band is filled with eclecticism and innovation.

For its traditional outdoor season-closing concert held on Hradcany Square at the foot of Prague Castle, the Czech Philharmonic Orchestra conducted by Finnish-Ukrainian Dalia Stasevska performs works by Leos Janacek, Lili Boulanger, Georges Bizet and Maurice Ravel.

Harris draws directly from his infancy and experience as a foster child. Combining photos, records, and other materials from his personal archives with 16mm film footage he recently shot in Senegal, Harris situates “the carcerality of the social welfare state and child services in relation to Black childhood in the US within the broader context of the transatlantic slave trade and the French Catholic Church’s colonization of West Africa and the Americas.

Film_title: Gravity Bach Complete performance of works for organ - Vol. 3
Description: An exceptional event took place from 31 October to 1 November 2025 at St Thomas's Church in Leipzig, where Bach was cantor: Johannes Lang performed the complete organ works of his illustrious predecessor. The 22-hour programme followed the liturgical year. This third part celebrates Pentecost and the three Sundays after Trinity Sunday.

A graduate of Berklee College of Music in Boston and winner of the Latin Grammy Cultural Foundation Award, this 29-year-old Colombian has so far had a flawless career. On his instrumental album Selah, the singer, pianist and multi-instrumentalist celebrates his spiritual attachment to music and blends jazz, Latin and Middle Eastern music.

Film_title: Martha Argerich and Daniel Barenboim in Buenos Aires - Great Moments of Music
Description: A memorable event: Martha Argerich and Daniel Barenboim in a piano duo in Buenos Aires! Together, the two friends had already performed almost everywhere in the world, except in their hometown. This first concert at the Teatro Colón was a great musical moment and, in a way, also a popular celebration.

Film_title: Pēteris Vasks The Fruit of Silence
Description: Slow, gentle, mysterious: Pēteris Vasks' music seems timeless. A major figure in contemporary composition, the composer blends Latvian traditions and Western European musical worlds with rare elegance. Choral music plays a central role in his work, as evidenced by this concert combining voices, strings and organ recorded in Ventspils.
The Orchestra, Choir, and Children's Choir of the Accademia Nazionale di Santa Cecilia, conducted by Riccardo Minasi, perform Bach's monumental St. Matthew Passion, BWV 244.

Film_title: Life of A Whore is Beautiful
Description: A storytelling film project exploring the intersection of HIV and sex work, created and led by current and former sex workers impacted by HIV, many of us living with HIV.
A compilation of footage taken in Texas between November 2024 and March 2025.

The Deep Clean is a short body-horror. A Young Woman cleans her moldy bathroom, but soon realizes the rot runs deep below the surface. The Deep Clean is an anti-war protest film inspired by “Viet ‘67.”

In a world where the internet bends to imagination, Websim.ai becomes the gateway to an ever-evolving realm of virtual exploration. From nostalgic recreations of lost websites to surreal digital playgrounds, this experimental documentary dives deep into the minds of indie creators and digital artists reshaping the way we experience the web. Blending tech history, retro aesthetics, and interactive storytelling, Websim movie is both a love letter to the early internet and a bold look at the future of simulated webspace.
Clinton Baptiste's full length stand-up video is here! Prepare for the paranormal power of laughter!
Alex, a degenerate gambler in debt to a gangster, is given a choice. Pick up and deliver ten mysterious lockboxes to a Los Angeles crime boss - or take a bullet to the head.

A fresh look at the FBI's investigation into the 2016 Trump Campaign and its many contacts with the Russians. What triggered the investigation, and what did it find? And why - apropos of nothing - does Donald Trump keep bringing up that salacious rumor about Russian prostitutes in a Moscow hotel? Narrated by Stormy Daniels, star witness at the 2024 trial that resulted in Trump being convicted of 34 felonies. —Joe Ayella

The Vienna Philharmonic present a star-studded evening in celebration of the 150th anniversary of the world-famous opera house Palais Garnier in Paris. Featuring some of the biggest names in opera - bass-baritone Sir Bryn Terfel, tenors Juan Diego Flórez and Rolando Villazón, and soprano Sonya Yoncheva - this special concert is full of classical treats, with music from Bizet’s Carmen, Verdi’s La Traviata and more. Completing the line-up is the ever-charismatic pianist Yuja Wang, with a performance of Tchaikovsky’s Piano Concerto No 1.
A narrative film.

Film_title: Introspection: The Creative Works of Suneeta Misra
Description: A cinematic journey through Indian lives, each story a quiet revelation told through one unmistakable voice.
A horror short film.
A mother struggles to hold her family together as multiple crises threaten to destroy them.
After an anonymous gift arrives at her doorstep, Meosha starts receiving mysterious visits that lead to a game of cat and mouse.
Elliana has to try to make a movie before a film deadline when something horrible occurs.
A bounty man of the west, reflecting on his sins while sitting fireside, is haunted by a ghost of his past, a spectre of embers.

Filmmaker Wen Wen films herself making her semi-autobiography, to analyze and empathize with her mother's pain. She films an Asian daughter running away from her family, unsure where to go. Not answering her weeping mother's calls and engaging in promiscuous behavior to obtain money or to spite the mother, the daughter then seeks refuge in her friend Gabrielle's home. While Gabrielle falls in love with a Chinese man that the daughter previously encountered, the daughter wishes for her mother to divorce her father. It remains a question of whether both the daughter and Filmmaker Wen Wen will return to her family.

Film_title: The Official Liverpool FC Season Review 2024/25
Description: The story of Arne Slot's first season at Anfield is one packed with incredible goals, unforgettable victories and emotional scenes as Title number 20 was clinched. For the first time since 1990, players, staff and supporters could celebrate together as Champions..
A young woman confides in her special horse, Neptune, who giver her hope and a renewed sense of life.

Based on a true story, the film follows Oscar, a sixteen-year-old from Oak Cliff who can see the dead. After a botched car theft, Oscar must rescue his friend Ducky from the bloodthirsty gangs that roam the streets and the roaming dead.

Fallout Operation: Sunburst depicts intense combat in the Mojave. SODAZ's fan animation shows a desperate battle for Helios One, featuring power armor and strategic maneuvers. Expect heavy weaponry, tactical decisions, and a gritty depiction of war.

Film_title: Gravity Bach Complete performance of works for organ - Vol. 2
Description: An exceptional event took place from 31 October to 1 November 2025 in St Thomas Church in Leipzig, where Bach was cantor: Johannes Lang performed the complete organ works of his illustrious predecessor. The 22-hour programme followed the liturgical year. The works in this second part celebrate Eastertide.

Film_title: A Christmas Carol - A Filmed Radio Play Live on Stage
Description: Television favourites Colin Baker and Peter Purves lead the cast in a new adaptation of Charles Dickens’ Christmas classic - which also features a rare, specially recorded appearance by Tom Baker as Jacob Marley! Presented by Crime And Comedy Theatre Company as a radio-play-live-on-stage and filmed at The Regal Theatre, Stowmarket, this is the 180th anniversary production of Dickens’ timeless tale of charity, forgiveness and redemption at Christmas.
A door that's leads to something more.
Two married surgeons navigate a series of revelations about their partners past life.
These two sisters fill any space with an energy as vibrant as it is intense, the result of a captivating blend of blues, rock and roots, carried by incredible virtuosity on the guitar.

Todd and Lisa are on the brink. As a big argument unfolds, we are treated to glimpses into their past when life was still ahead of them. At the end, secrets come to light, and past issues surface that threaten to tear them apart.

Ajadi, a weathered man shaped by years of toil, is caught in a storm while out fishing and thrown into the ocean. He drifts unconscious to awaken in an in-between state in a strange metaphysical space where the sea is calm, the sky unnatural, and a mysterious voice calls his name.
A small group of 23-year-olds attempt to make it in their respective art careers all the while dealing with love, loss, growing up, and reality.

To mark the 50th anniversary of Dmitri Shostakovich's death, the Leipzig Gewandhaus Orchestra and the Boston Symphony Orchestra perform his Symphony No. 7, known as the ‘Leningrad’, a symbol of resistance against fascism.
“Two Roads” reveals centuries of connection between African American and Irish culture.
When Solkor threatens Blood Planet, it's up to Vagitron to end him.

Film_title: Philippe Katerine @ Les Eurockéennes de Belfort 2025
Description: An iconoclastic figure in French pop music, Philippe Katerine combines poetic absurdity, surreal humor, and social criticism in performances that defy classification. His performance at the Paris Olympic Games opening ceremony caused a sensation. Now it's time for a preview of his show at Eurockéennes 2025.
A sequel to the Short Film Ahai
Follow the adventures of a college town heavy metal band as they become flesh eating cannibals!

When SWAT sergeant Joel McGraw's brother is murdered, he travels to the small town of Breaux Bridge, Louisiana to say his goodbyes - only to find out his brother was looking into the town's deepest darkest secrets.
A short student film.

At a work Christmas dinner, Irene, a Spanish woman who learned English with the aim of succeeding professionally abroad, feels invisible in a conversation where her colleagues only ask superficial questions. Irene does not feel heard and begins to reflect on her place in a world marked by inequality and the importance of recognizing privileges she could not appreciate before.

In Good Hands is a prismatic investigation of gender roles, care, and the meaning of good work. The film features six people who have challenged gender stereotypes to find meaningful work, including a carpenter-turned-beekeeper, a stay-at-home dad, a highland cattle breeder, a flower farmer, an auto body technician, and an early childhood educator. Following them through their work day, the film explores the tenuous balancing act between self-satisfaction through career, nurturing others, and contribution to the greater good.

In the Light of Truth" is an educational drama that follows a diverse group of middle school students as they navigate the complexities of friendship, health education, and the stigma surrounding HIV/AIDS. Through engaging storytelling and relatable characters, the film aims to empower young audiences with knowledge about prevention, support, and compassion. With the help of a passionate teacher and a community healthcare advocate, the students embark on a journey of discovery, ultimately learning that understanding and kindness can lead to acceptance and positive change in their school and community. This film not only serves to inform but also to foster empathy and understanding among youth, making it a vital resource for schools and communities.

Ares, a ruthless criminal, seeks to reclaim his family's underworld empire. Betrayal and deception haunt his path as he battles former allies and lovers. Determined to avenge his father's murder and reunite his family, Ares faces his toughest challenge yet: uncovering the truth behind the chaos.

Film_title: Fragments of Eternity – Live At The Complex
Description: OUCH™ presents a performance by Sloucho, Spooklet, Rory Sweeney, Rhoshi, Vaticanjail & Brawni.

You Sick Fuck is a documentary about local deathmatch wrestling. It details the hard work and passion behind the wrestlers and organizers of UWF and WTW, two local wrestling organizations. This film is a near 4 hour long age restricted messy fun experience, with many matches and interviews with amazing athletes. ENJOY!

Black Cats is a grounded and realistic superhero movie that delves into the struggles faced by everyday Americans and the broader human family. Set in Chicago, the film follows a group of determined locals, known as the "Black Cats," who unite to take on corruption at every level-within government, corporations, politics, and even street gangs.

A heartfelt drama where forbidden love challenges power, corruption, and greed. Thabo, a poor man, falls for Moipone, a wealthy tycoon’s daughter, sparking a battle of loyalty, courage, and justice when dark secrets are exposed.

Film_title: Christoph Eschenbach @ National Forum of Music in Wrocław
Description: As a child, Christoph Eschenbach was forced to flee Wrocław in 1945. On 25 April 2025, he returns to his home town to commemorate the end of the Second World War. For this solemn concert, the conductor has chosen to combine Arnold Schönberg's post-war work A Survivor from Warsaw with Johannes Brahms's German Requiem.
Two stubborn exes litigate their previous relationship after a pocket dial pairs them together again.

Director: Micheal Kraft, Oliver Dauer et al
Description: Jamaican singer Etana made a name for herself in 2008 with album The Strong One, blending reggae, soul, jazz and R'n'B. Twice nominated for a Grammy Award, she has long established herself as one of the great voices of reggae.

Film_title: Ballake Sissoko & Piers Faccini @ Jazz à Porquerolles 2025
Description: On the Jazz à Porquerolles stage, Ballaké Sissoko's kora blends with the delicate folk of Piers Faccini. It's a subtle and spellbinding union, sealed by a four-handed album: Our Calling.

Director: Micheal Kraft, Oliver Dauer et al
Description: Mr. Vegas, stage name of Clifford Smith, is a stage animal who has been playing at the world's best reggae festivals since 1998. His fans are everywhere, from Europe to the United States to Japan.

Director: Micheal Kraft, Oliver Dauer et al
Description: In 1994, five children of Jamaican reggae singer Denroy Morgan launched the group Morgan Heritage. Their irresistible charisma and hard-hitting talent won them an international following and two Grammy Awards.

Film_title: Arthur Honegger : Le Roi David Avec Amira Casar et Lambert Wilson
Description: With actors Lambert Wilson and Amira Casar as guests of honor, this concert puts the voice at the center of its program. A magnificent performance by the Radio France Choir and Children's Choir, as well as the ensemble Les Apaches! and the Paris National Opera Academy.
A film by Robert Mizaki.
Experimental musician and shoplifter, Trudy, arrives at a guardianship building full of eccentrics to take care of a dog in exchange for free accommodation.

Director: Oliver Dauer, Micheal Kraft et al
Description: Mortimer's compositions blend roots reggae with more contemporary influences. His remarkable voice moves with disconcerting ease from a deep, raw timbre to a delicate falsetto.
When Thandiwe goes missing while uncovering a conspiracy, the only two people who can find her are her ex lover and current boyfriend. Will they work together with her life on the line?

Film_title: Mirga Gražinytė-Tyla @ Radio France Philharmonic Orchestra
Description: Under the baton of Lithuanian conductor Mirga Gražinytė-Tyla, the Radio France Philharmonic Orchestra performs works by Lili Boulanger, Romualdas Gražinis and Anton Bruckner.

After escaping the Holocaust and leaving behind his wife, German-born David Ludwig Bloch emigrated to Shanghai, China. There, he met a new love, Lily, whom he migrated to America with. Decades later, his two children, from two separate families and two separate lives, try to piece together the life of the enigmatic artist, David Bloch.

This American soul-pop group, led by siblings Clyde and Gracie Lawrence, has appeared on Jimmy Fallon and Kelly Clarkson's television shows. They have shared the stage with the Rolling Stones, the Jonas Brothers and Vulfpeck, and have performed at major festivals such as Coachella and Bonnaroo.

Film_title: Renaud Capuçon and Julia Hagen @ Rheingau Musik Festival
Description: What a prestigious cast for this Brahms evening! Renaud Capuçon and Julia Hagen, two internationally acclaimed artists, first perform the Double Concerto for violin and cello. They are accompanied by the Bamberg Symphony Orchestra conducted by Jakub Hrůša. The concert ends in style with Symphony No. 4.

Following the great festivals this summer, Within Temptation takes over the Faster Stage at Wacken Open Air, August 2nd 2025. Setlist: We Go to War Bleed Out Faster In the Middle of the Night Stand My Ground Wireless Shot in the Dark Angels Paradise (What About Us?) Don't Pray for Me Supernova Lost The Reckoning Encore: Our Solemn Hour Shed My Skin (with Annisokay – Christoph Wieczorek) Ice Queen Mother Earth

The Convict is given the chance to regain his freedom by accepting a risky mission about saving the life of US President Gerald Ford 60 years in the past. The mission becomes complicated when the Convict travels through an experimental time machine, uncertain of when or where he will arrive and whether the mission will succeed. Will he be able to complete the mission and regain his freedom?

Living in a trashy apartment and threatened with eviction, unemployed Jacob Clayton finds himself climbing up an online leaderboard where kindness is cash. The app's annual kindness competition is Jacob's last chance to escape poverty, but with the price of every action being monitored and overseen.

Lonesome Ghosts explores the ramifications of undercover policing in the UK. Organised into four chapters, the film focuses on the history and role of undercover policing in British life. Moving between filmed and found footage, evidence and personal testimony, the work offers an examination of the complex affinities between personal commitment, state violence and visual culture. Each chapter centres a different voice or material: a meeting with an exhausted and lonely political organiser; silent footage of a funeral filmed by an undercover policing unit in 1979; an interview with a photographer who discovered he was the target of police surveillance; and a filmmaker grappling with the dreams and failures of collective filmmaking. Commissioned by Peer, London.
A man, born bigfoot, decides he wants to be a Vinewood star, an actor. He tries his best to make it to fame, coming across many obstacles on the way.
Alla Scala theater 2025

Untitled (Door), emerges from research on philosopher Ludwig Wittgenstein’s architecture, following his exit from philosophy after the publication of Tractatus Logico-Philosophicus. Images of windows, doors, walls, apertures, surfaces, slide in and out of the frame, generating unruly interiors, a symbolic search for an exit, operating within a language of intervals and sequences. An alternative to philosophy: making a house, a window, a door.

“Kacey, a woman consumed by her thoughts and loneliness, begins to experience a sense that she’s being watched. No matter where she turns, invasive eyes stare back, corrupting her mind and driving her to the brink of destruction. Will Kacey overpower the darkness growing inside her? Or will she be seduced by the shadows that threaten to uproot her life as she knows it?”
A narrative short film.

"Caged (In) and Out", by Rishabh Jain, a jarring account of domestic domestic violence in India. The film produced in-house by JIBS, sheds light on the pervasive issue of domestic violence in India, offering an intimate perspective through the voices of survivors and their families. It also highlights the relentless efforts of grassroots women-led organizations fighting for justice and the urgent need for early gender sensitization in communities.

Film_title: Beyond time and space : The Bridges Chamber Orchestra plays Türkmenoglu, Beethoven, and Pashasadeh
Description: The Bridges Chamber Orchestra (“composing orchestra”) composes and arranges its own music. Under Zahia Ziouani, there will be two world premieres: “alterity 2.0” by Hindol Deb, Peter Klohmann, Alireza Meghrazi (with soloist Sahib Pashazadeh) and a tribute to Beethoven's 5th Piano Concerto by flutist Johanna-L. Dahlhoff. Violinist Ceren Türkmenoğlu plays her work “Solstice” on the rebab.

Countertenor Carlo Vistoli takes us on a musical journey through 17th-century Italy. The nascent opera genre was producing its first masterpieces at the time, with composers such as Monteverdi, Cesti, Cavalli and Stradella. These genius composers laid the foundations for opera and helped establish it as a major art form. The programme includes arias, love laments and scenes of madness.
