Description: Krokus are the Swiss answer to classic stadium hard rock: massive, melodic, and razor-sharp. Since the mid-70s, they've delivered anthems like "Headhunter," "Screaming in the Night," and "Midnite Maniac," which have lost none of their brilliance decades later. With over 15 million albums sold and international stadium appearances, they're among the most consistent acts in the scene. At Wacken, Krokus demonstrate that rock can work without frills. Pure energy, honest riffs, and songs that immediately stick in your head: robust, charismatic, and a piece of music history in every note.

Film_title: nerdynotlive: THE COMPLETE FIRST AND SECOND SEASONS
Description: Funny shitshow. Episodes 1-22.

Film_title: Michael Schenker: My Years With Ufo Wacken Open Air
Description: Michael Schenker is regarded as one of the greatest guitarists in hard rock. A virtuoso who, back in the 1970s, wrote anthems with the Scorpions and later with UFO that still resonate today. His melodic solos, unmistakable sound, and knack for big hooks made songs like Doctor Doctor, Rock Bottom, and Lights Out immortal. With the program My Years With UFO, Schenker travels back to that era when he ignited the British band with his German fire and left a defining mark on their music. This nostalgic trip is not just about the classics, but also about the story of a young guitar genius who took the rock world by storm. At Wacken, fans can look forward to a master reliving his own legends in full brilliance.

Film_title: Charlotte Film Festival Shorts Programs: JOY IN THE LITTLE THINGS (Documentary Shorts #1)
Description: From a Venezuelan immigrant delivering traditional cuisine via bicycle in San Francisco to NYC’s most iconic driving instructor preparing students for the road ahead, the characters in this collection of documentary short films live out their passions on a daily basis. Titles: Arepas en Bici | Livestreams with GrandmaPuzzles | The Endless Wave | TRIP-tych! | Looking Forward | Shanti Rides Shotgun | I Am Louise

Film_title: Destruction Live at Wacken Open Air
Description: Sometimes a single note is enough to make it clear: nothing here will ever be the same again. For over four decades, Destruction has delivered precisely this feeling with a force that has lost none of its edge. In 2025, they returned to Wacken with a new album, a new lineup, and their familiar ferocity. Frontman Schmier leads a set that leaves no room for frills. Pure thrash, fast, hard, and straight to the core. Anyone who thinks veterans rest on their laurels hasn't seen Destruction live in a long time. Here, nothing burns down, everything burns to the ground. Setlist: "Curse the Gods", "Invincible Force", "Nailed to the Cross", "Mad Butcher", "Life Without Sense", "Under the Spell", "Diabolical", "Total Desaster", "No Kings No Masters", "Destruction", "Bestial Invasion", "Thrash 'Til Death"

Founded in 1997, the Italian band Elvenking has created a unique style that blends heavy metal, folk, rock, and classical elements. This sonic diversity serves to bring captivating stories to life and has earned the band a loyal fan base worldwide. At Summer Breeze, the musicians present an energetic show full of magic and rousing anthems. Setlist: "Throes of Atonement", "Pagan Revolution", "Silverseal", "The Ghosting", "Moonbeam Stone Circle", "The Divided Heart", "Elvenlegions", "Draugen's Maelstrom"

Film_title: Neal Morse - Live at the Cavern Club
Description: Neal Morse performs Beatles covers at the Cavern Club in Liverpool, England on June 2, 2025.
Chronicles the spiritual awakening of philosopher Simone Weil. Meanwhile, two vagabonds living in her garden settle down for night.

Esme pretends to fall for the man responsible for the loss of her sister in an attempt to take revenge on his family at their upcoming reunion. But this plan takes a grisly turn for the worse as Esme discovers the family's darkest secrets.

Film_title: Beyond The Black Live at Wacken
Description: Within just a few years, Beyond the Black have catapulted themselves from newcomers to the forefront of modern symphonic metal. Driven by Jennifer Haben's powerful voice, they combine orchestral elegance with hard riffing and anthemic choruses that immediately catch the ear. Their songs speak of inner strength, longing, and the power to continually reinvent themselves. Live, they radiate an energy that inspires both dancing and dreaming—a perfect blend of metal thunderstorm and magical storytelling. Beyond the Black prove that big emotions and grand gestures still have a place in metal today.

Film_title: Vicious Vixens: Dawn of the Vicious
Description: Vicious Vixens: Dawn of the Vicious

Feeling lost isn't always about where you are-it's about who's missing. Set against a backdrop of quiet disorientation and shared chaos, Lost and Found is a reminder that some people feel like gravity in a world that won't stop spinning.

‎February 26th 2018, two best friends, Griffin and Groovy, try to survive three violently dangerous children-like anomalies known as The Three Kids, as they sing their way to survival in a musical adventure.

The Kanneh-Mason family has produced several outstanding musicians. In addition to Sheku, arguably the family’s most famous member, his sister Jenneba Kanneh-Mason—the third of the siblings—is also pursuing a solo career. At the 2025 Ruhr Piano Festival, she will present an evocative program ranging from Bach to Beethoven to Chopin.

When the noise of the world gets too loud, escape isn't about running away-it's about remembering how to breathe. Escape is a quiet reckoning with distraction, stillness, and the everyday moments that slowly lead you back to yourself.
HallyUM’s remake of the 2006 Korean film “200 Pounds Beauty.”
A romantic comedy about a hole in a husbands logic.
Set in the 1950s, it tells the story of Annabelle, a little girl longing for connection, and her mother Margaret, a sensitive poet torn between her artistry and the demands of family and society.

Film_title: Shani Diluka - Renaissance Royal Abbey of Fontevraud
Description: With Renaissance, Shani Diluka embarks on a musical exploration of the era of the same name, which laid the foundation for Western thought and sensibility. She focuses primarily on two key centers of influence: humanist Italy and Elizabethan England. Program: I. Renaissance music, emergence and dissemination of the first scores thanks to Gutenberg (Eccles, Dowland, Byrd, etc.) II. Renaissance and early humanists: music of the spheres becomes music of the humanities (Palestrina, Monteverdi, Frescobaldi, etc.) III. The Renaissance and the Golden Ratio: proportion and beauty (Purcell, Handel, etc.) IV. The Renaissance, a decisive legacy in the history of music thanks to polyphony, harmony, and the development of the relationship between text and music (Scarlatti, Bach, etc.)
Taken footage of a wedding and a crew of photographers.
A dark science fiction film.
A tale about two old friends, Alpha Buck and Alpha Bear and how there newfound hatred for each other can have serious consequences.

Keaton, a thirty-something former bachelor, is stuck in limbo. His ex-girlfriend (who he's still in love with) just gave birth to his son, his current girlfriend is saying 'it's her or me,' and he's stuck in Tennessee at his grandpa's funeral with his crazy southern family.
A detective named Dalton has to take down this vengeful cow, while meeting other people that have connections to this cow.

Film_title: The Stolen Life of Lucy the Elephant
Description: Lucy: The Stolen Lives of Elephants is the FIRST documentary film to reveal the plight of elephants in captivity and investigate the lies that zoos tell the unknowing public under the guise of wildlife conservation and education.
Every January, the ESNS festival welcomes the cream of the new European music scene. Discover a few selected tracks from its 2025 edition.

Film_title: Dark Side Cowboys: Live at KF Sub
Description: Live at KF Sub, August 20, 2022.

Film_title: Four hands for Mendelssohn Lucas & Arthur Jussen with Andris Nelsons
Description: Lucas & Arthur Jussen are currently the most successful young piano duo. Accompanied by the Gewandhaus Orchestra under the baton of Andris Nelsons, they follow in the footsteps of composer Felix Mendelssohn Bartholdy and his sister Fanny with Mendelssohn's First Concerto for Two Pianos and Orchestra.
A comedy special wrapped in a documentary about insecurity, creativity, and wanting to be better.
With their openly Dadaist approach, Estonian Puuluup are giving Northern European folk music a fresh lease of life. Discover the phenomenon at the Europavox festival.

Film_title: OSN: Giulio Cilona dirige il tradizionale Concerto di Natale 2025

Composers: Orchestra Sinfonica di Torino della RAI

Description: From the Rai Arturo Toscanini Auditorium in Turin, Giulio Cilona conducts the Rai Orchestra’s Christmas Concert, featuring works by Vivaldi, Bach, Mozart, and Beethoven. The concert features Marco Braito and Roberto Rossi on trumpets and soprano Francesca Aspromonte.

In a quiet village, Bhure's family faces poverty, fear, and old rivalries as Bhima and Pasho dream of a better future for their unborn child. With Dilawar, the rising influence of drugs, and fragile relationships, the lines between loyalty, greed, and truth blur, placing an innocent child in the eye of a storm.
A film by David Reisman.

Film_title: The French Youth Orchestra plays Shostakovich & Rimsky-Korsakov With Alexandre Tharaud
Description: The French Youth Orchestra showcases young French artists aged 16 to 25. Accompanied here by pianist Alexandre Tharaud, the ensemble performs works by Shostakovich, Maresz, and Rimsky-Korsakov.

Film_title: Power Pro Lucha: World of Ruin
Description: “The end draws near…” Witness the epic season finale “World of Ruin”, as Power Pro Lucha closes out its inaugural year with a bang! Rivalries will come to a head, new paths will be forged, and questions will be answered—and raised!
A documentary about Los Angeles International Airport in the year 2025.

A laid-back village watchman discovers a strange gift; whatever he dreams at 4 a.m. becomes reality. When donation money is stolen, he pretends to dream the truth, until a real dream reveals a shocking secret: he himself is the thief. With a young man blackmailing him and the village closing in, he manipulates everyone and ultimately escapes with the stolen cash.

Film_title: The Isolado Reemerge: Unknown Depths of the Amazon
Description: An indigenous people from the remote corners of the Amazon rainforest step out of the shadows as the modern world encroaches on their territory. Astonishing new footage reveals how these uncontacted people have changed over the last decade.
Livestreamed on the Lost Lands Youtube channel.

A lively Igbo village romantic comedy-drama that followed three close friends Nneka, Ogechi, and Oluchi, who's dreams were getting married to a rich husband and escaping their village traumas. Their fantasies seem to come true when Martins, a charming,flashy contractor arrives to build a community hall. Handsomely and smooth-talking he secretly began to date the ladies, deceitfully Martins promises the ladies marriage enslaving them upon a dream that will never come, but hell break loose we the ladies noticed what was going on right beneath their nose and the reverse became the case.

Film_title: Vincent Peirani & Émile Parisien Quintet @ Leverkusener Jazztage 2025
Description: With ‘Living Being IV: Time Reflexion’, Vincent Peirani and his quintet have created an album deeply rooted in a reflection on our times. During the first lockdown, the accordionist took advantage of this enforced break to reflect on the impact of time on our existence and our view of the world.

In this gripping romantic thriller, a desperate young couple, suffocated by their rigid lives, risk everything on a daring diamond heist that promises freedom and a fresh start. But as their plan spins out of control and trust between them erodes, they're forced to confront a harsh reality: can love endure betrayal, violence, and fear, or was their dream of escape doomed from the very beginning? When the stakes are life and death, the line between passion and destruction blurs beyond recognition.

Film_title: The Most Biodiverse Place in America
Description: Set in the sun-soaked canyons and coastlines of San Diego County, The Most Biodiverse Place in America is an intimate portrait of place, purpose, and generational connection. Told through the lens of John Fiske — a passionate naturalist and educator — and his sons Johnny and Charlie, the film explores the richest ecological county in the United States. As father and sons move through chaparral, oak woodlands, snowy mountains, desert expanse, and coastal bluffs, they share a bond rooted in curiosity and care for the land. John’s decades of work protecting habitats and species comes alive in his mentorship of Johnny and Charlie, who see the future of conservation through their father’s eyes. Together, they reflect on what it means to grow up grounded — in a landscape teeming with life and in a legacy built on stewardship. A story of biodiversity, family, and the fragile beauty of what surrounds us — if we choose to see it.
A rising fashion designer's launch is threatened when a former partner resurfaces, sending haunting messages that risk destroying his life.

Clarice and Chase Scott have the perfect suburban life on the outside. However, their marriage that was built on passion, has become a battlefield of deceit, infidelity, and betrayal. Clarice finds solace in the arms of another man, while Chase's greed seems to unravel everything they've built. Will their marriage survive?

Film_title: Tatyana Jane @ ARTE Mix ø Trabendo 2025
Director: Thierry Gautier, Gautier & Leduc et al
Description: With her unique musical style, Tatyana Jane blends Cameroonian traditions with global influences. It’s an irresistible mix that we enjoyed to our heart’s content at ARTE Mix ø Trabendo.

Film_title: To Be a Jew: Frank Lowy In His Own Words
Description: Sir Frank Lowy has lived many lives. Born in Slovakia in 1930, he lost his father in the Holocaust, he fought in the Arab-Israeli War in 1948 and left Israel in 1952 for Australia to join family members who had settled in Sydney. There, Lowy met fellow immigrant John Saunders and together they opened their first shopping centre in Sydney in 1959, which led to the multi-billion-dollar international shopping centre empire, Westfield Corporation.

Film_title: La Cima de la Vida – El valor de la memoria
Description: An intimate, painful, and hopeful story about the power of love when memory begins to fade.

Following the events of Son of Beast, Joshua Hall and the Beast work with other characters across MHHM films to stop Jonathan Scar's master plan, a plan set in motion by a man named The Magician. He seeks to collect the pillars of power, five ancient items that grant its user limitless ability, in order to conquer the universe.

Film_title: International ARD Music Competition 2025 Prize Winners' Concert
Description: At the close of the 74th ARD International Music Competition, the best clarinetists, trumpeters, and pianists perform at the winners' concert. They are accompanied by one of the world's most renowned ensembles: the Bavarian Radio Symphony Orchestra, conducted by Sasha Scolnik-Brower.

With his unparalleled sense of melody, Kölsch has been a pillar of the international techno scene for years. His releases on the Kompakt label and his collaborations with artists like Tiga or Sasha demonstrate his ability to effortlessly bridge the gap between emotion and energy. At Street Parade 2025, he will deliver a set as euphoric as it is deep—a sensational show tailored for the dancefloor.
After a routine mission in Space, an unknown lifeform that was hidden on the starship is unleashed on Los Angeles

Film_title: Kyohei Sorita performs Mozart @ Salzburg Festival 2025
Description: At the Salzburg Festival, Japanese pianist Kyohei Sorita will conduct the Mozarteum Orchestra from the piano in a concert entirely dedicated to the city’s musical prodigy. The program includes, among other works, Piano Concertos Nos. 9 and 27.
The story of one of the greatest live concerts ever filmed, with interviews with band members Jon Farriss and Kirk Pengilly, plus never-before-seen backstage moments.

Film_title: Boris Godunov Mussorgsky (Dutch National Opera & Ballet)
Description: Nobleman Boris Godunov accumulates power in Russia, first as regent, then as tsar. But the ghosts of the past catch up with him and he ends up losing not only his power but his sanity. Russia sinks ever deeper into a mire of corruption, intrigue and coups. In his grand choral opera, Modest Mussorgsky deals with a theme that offers poignant parallels to today’s world: the extremes to which one man’s thirst for power can lead. The director Kirill Serebrennikov incorporates his own experiences in Russia presenting his take on an opera about political turmoil and its consequences. Serebrennikov’s production focuses on the effect on the people of high-stakes political scheming. Conductor Vasily Petrenko makes his Amsterdam debut leading the Royal Concertgebouw Orchestra. A top-flight cast is led bass-baritone Tomasz Konieczny, celebrated for his ability to get into the skin of his characters both vocally and dramatically, sings the title role for the first time.

Film_title: The Mountbatten Festival of Music 2025 | The Bands of HM Royal Marines

Director: Micheal Kraft, Oliver Dauer et al
Description: In Germany, the memorable performance by reggae artist Alborosie and his band, the Shengen Clan, at the 2025 Summerjam Festival.

The Bog crew is back on the hunt for another deadly cryptid in the dark Northeast Forrest. The BCU continues to expand their ever growing world of mysterious cryptids and urban legends with a new investigation into the elusive "Rake"!!!!!.

NST Bike New Zealand brings the world’s best freeride mountain bikers to Queenstown’s stunning Mt. Dewar. This groundbreaking event blends big mountain terrain with freestyle features across intersecting lines, redefining traditional formats. Elite riders from big mountain, slopestyle, freeride and downhill showcase the pinnacle of the sport in this thrilling rider-driven competition.
In this short film a couple navigate depredation and anxiety when it manifests in the real world by the woman growing into her bed unable to leave.

Film_title: Brad Mehldau With the Frankfurt Radio Big Band
Description: Brad Mehldau is one of the most important jazz pianists of our time. The Frankfurt Radio Big Band and its composer in residence Darcy James Argue present some of Mehldau's pieces for the ensemble at Hamburg's Elbphilharmonie.

Reverend James Walters and his wife Jessica, the first lady are struggling with a failing church, a pending debt and are losing members day by day. Reverend James does not confide in his wife the severity of the problem, putting the church in potential peril. Jean, Jessica's cousin stumbles on incidental opportunity which could spiral Jessica's life out of control!!!!

Mia, a top student burdened by expectations, who secretly yearns for the passion of music once shared with her late father. When a school piano competition ignites her long-suppressed dreams, Mia must choose between a safe, prescribed future and the daring pursuit of her true calling.

Reserve 107: A Path Forward presents a major update of the Young Chippewayan saga. This new documentary shares the on-going story of the Young Chippewayan band / Stoney Knoll First Nation as they work with Mennonites and Lutherans to right the wrongs of the past. Since the release of the original documentary in 2016, there have been some significant advances in the story, including visits to Ottawa, the development of the Stoney Knoll Interpretive Site, and repeated gatherings at this sacred meeting place. This 2025 sequel offers heart-filled inspiration and a thought-provoking model for other communities across Turtle Island / North America who want to pursue the hard work of truth-telling and reconciliation.

TRIPPING The Muskoka Lakes takes viewers on a three-hour boat ride along some of the most famous shorelines in Ontario. Journey past opulent cottages and boathouses. Watch steamships ply the waters just as they did a century ago. Visit long lost resorts, an historic inn, a boat-only church and an eerie shipwreck. The Muskoka Lakes are a place of contrast; a mixture of wooden heritage cottages and billionaire steel and glass cottages, stunning resorts combined with slices of pristine wilderness.

The world’s biggest sand bike race is back in 2025! This legendary sporting event in extreme conditions brings together some 2,700 riders every year. A legendary race, the Enduropale du Touquet-Pas-de-Calais is a must for speed lovers, sand and sea spray. Enduropale du Touquet-Pas-de-Calais is an enduro bike – and now quad – race that’s taken place on the beach at Le Touquet, France, every year since 1975. It was the brainchild of adventurer, racer and founder of the original Paris-Dakar, Thierry Sabine, who was approached to develop an event to bring people to Le Touquet during the off-season, and its success provided Sabine with some of the motivation to create the Paris-Dakar Rally in 1978.
Colorado Territory, 1869. When a cholera outbreak devastates a remote mining camp, a pregnant woman must trek 97 miles of unforgiving wilderness—her young child in tow—to save her family’s lives.

Film_title: Marcus D. Wiley: Marriage Is Major Surgery
Description: Ali Siddiq presents and executive produces the third comedy special from Marcus D. Wiley, Marriage is Major Surgery. This one-of-a-kind performance is ideal for the married, the wanna be married, the used to be married and the wanna be married again. With millions of marriages in meltdown mode and divorce rates dialing up, it’s clear that across the country relationships are in need of intervention; but, the problem is not a lack of interest. It’s a lack of understanding. Confusion in communication and what to expect are at the crux of the dilemma. Viewers will leave intrigued, informed and thoroughly entertained as Marcus weaves scenarios with which listeners are intimately acquainted with truths, that can change the trajectory of even strained relationships.
Jane McDonald looks ahead to the New Year, while belting out a party playlist of floor fillers, showstoppers and toe-tapping tunes. Plus, a sing-a-long with Jane at home and a few celebrity surprises
Tractor Ted goes and sees lots of Big Machines working with lavender, Sunny Seeds and Hey Haylage.

Film_title: Les musiques de Fontainebleau au Théâtre impérial
Description: Hidden away in the heart of the Château de Fontainebleau, the Théâtre de l’Impératrice Eugénie is one of the most secret treasures of this jewel of French heritage. Closed to the public, this exceptional venue is reopening its doors for a concert given by Les Talens Lyrique and soprano Marie Lys.
A biopic based on the life of Nozhan Behzadi

Cast: Members of the Australian Chamber Orchestra
Description: Hosted by Jeremy Fernandez and Megan Burslem, this concert showcases why the Australian Chamber Orchestra is one of the most distinct, inventive and renowned ensembles on the world stage today.
The haylage needs to get all wrapped up so the tedders, rakes, balers and wrappers get to work.
Farmer Tom helps trim the trees and a tractor with a spinning cab brings the chipper to chop them into chips.
Milk from the cows, strawberries picked by Tractor Ted and lots of farm machines help make scrummy ice cream.
Tractor Ted and Midge are on a bug hunt for caterpillars but find a giant tractor with catepillar tracks.
Emma and Ewan show Tractor Ted and Midge their sheepdogs and farm on the Isle of Bute
A fragmented collection of private home video footage, interwined with the moon and stars.
Farmer Tom gets lots of machines to help him turn straw into food for the mushrooms.

After half a decade of persistent research and an exhaustive series of investigations, Steve Shippy and his team believed they had finally rid the Brockway home of the sinister presence that had tormented the Braley family. The atmosphere had shifted, the energy had calmed, and for the first time in years, peace seemed to settle over the historic Saginaw residence. Nearly a year passed in quiet reprieve — life was seemingly getting back to normal. That tranquility was shattered when a frantic late-night 911 call was made from the manor. The activity had not only returned, but had grown darker, more intelligent, and dangerously aware. As the line between the living and the dead once again began to blur, the team uncovered new, unsettling evidence that the haunting had never truly ended — it had only been waiting to strike again.
Midwinter's Eve has arrived on Tulipop Island. But when the Munchkin's gifts go wrong, four friends journey to Cloud Castle to uncover the mystery.
A documentary film which presents the richness and diversity of Warwickshire’s historical narratives, while challenging common stereotypes about its towns and cities.
When the world recedes and material happiness becomes a nuisance value, a mentally distracted self-critique rediscovers his soul by riding his Ferris Wheel, in search for his roots.

When Floor Jansen takes the stage, that rare moment of absolute presence arises. Tension fills the air even before the first note is played. Known as the exceptional voice of Nightwish, she has cemented a firm place in the music world outside of the band with her solo debut "Paragon" and songs like "Fire" and "Storm." Her voice combines power and grace, opera and rock, vulnerability and determination; it is an instrument that transforms emotions into sound and then back into emotions. Those who experience her live immediately sense that this isn't just a singer, but an entire story unfolding in music. Her setlist includes tracks by Nightwish and After Forever. Setlist: Wolf and Dog, ⁠Noise, ⁠Invincible, ⁠Storm, ⁠Spider Silk, ⁠Amaranth, ⁠Energize Me, ⁠7 Days to the Wolves, While Love Died, ⁠Face Your Demons, ⁠Nemo, ⁠Fire.

Power metal is in the Hansen family's blood. How else could you explain Tim Hansen following in the footsteps of his legendary father Kai Hansen (Helloween, Gamma Ray) to conquer the world with his own band, featuring anthemic vocals, blistering guitars, and epic storytelling? On August 1st 2025 Induction took to the stage at Wacken Open Air, to show that with 2 albums under their belt, they are here to stay! Setlist: "Born From Fire", "Fallen Angel", "I Am Alive", "Beyond Horizons", "Medusa", "A Call Beyond", "Go to Hell", "Queen of Light"

For 45 years, Grave Digger have stood like a rock in the surf of German heavy metal. Founded in 1980 by Chris Boltendahl, the Teutonic metallers have made history with albums like "Heavy Metal Breakdown" and "Tunes of War" and continue to perform tirelessly to this day. Their songs sound like battle cries full of pathos, power, and unmistakable riff violence. For their 45th anniversary, they bring the full load of Grave Digger myth to Wacken: a journey through almost half a century of metal, featuring all the anthems that have shaped generations. On the hallowed ground, they celebrate themselves – loudly, proudly, uncompromisingly – and demonstrate that true heavy metal is timeless and hasn't slowed down one bit.
A horror comedy film about a church youth group "Lock In" gone wrong.
Reflection (2025) is a Burmese Supernatural Drama film.

The long-running showdown between Jude and Liam reaches its thrilling conclusion in Pool in Agadir – The Finale. Set against the warm, sunlit backdrop of Agadir, Morocco, this feature-length finale follows the duo through four intense games of pool—each more competitive and emotionally charged than the last. What began as a casual webseries evolves here into something more personal and dramatic. With the score heavily in Liam’s favor, the stakes are high: can Jude finally secure a win before the series ends? As the games unfold, so do moments of tension, humor, and genuine friendship. The final film not only captures their rivalry but also celebrates the strange intimacy of shared obsession, rituals, and running jokes. FOUR GAMES. ONE MOVIE. And only one winner.
A boozy, brilliant, locally notorious medium chases stardom, but her messy personal life hilariously derails her dreams of fame.
Thrilled by his nephew Amir's migration to the US, Bruce's elation dims as he uncovers Amir's enigmatic nature and the unraveling mysteries threaten to shatter his world.

Film_title: Real Life Thing: Live Concert Film
Description: Live concert film of Sam Blasucci's "Real Life Thing", featuring extended versions and hand-painted sets.
A family barricades themselves in their Tokyo home during a global crisis, but buried secrets soon resurface, threatening to tear them apart.

Soundscapes of Self is an immersive audio documentary exploring the intricacies of gender and voice, told through voiceover, designed sound elements, and interviews with Canadian transgender people and speech professionals. Using the medium of audio, listeners are able to be uninfluenced by appearance and learn the ways that they are subconsciously performing and interpreting gender through their own voices.
Mitch McTaggart once again reviews Australian television broadcasting from January to December, with highlights of the good, the bad and the cringe.
Plot unknown

Film_title: Johann Strauss : Wiener Blut @ Château de Schönbrunn, Vienne
Description: In Vienna, at the Schönbrunn Palace Theater, director Nikolaus Habjan, in collaboration with conductor Hannah Eisendle, presents the operetta “Wiener Blut,” based on waltzes by Johann Strauss Jr.

Complete live performance at ProgTokyo 2025 Spring, 11 tracks including 4 previously unreleased songs and the 20+ minute "Force Dimension". Song List 01. La Porte de l'Enfer (The Gate of Hell) (6:58) 02. Shippuu Jinrai (4:05) 03. Karma (8:06) 04. Calm Sea (9:13) 05. Sthenno (7:31) 06. Euryale (8:52) 07. Closed World (7:24) 08. From rookie wagers to risky parlays, the line between spectator and sports bettor is thinner than ever, where the thrill of the bet is just one tap away.

SB19 FAST ZONE: A Concert-Fashion Show Araneta Coliseum October 26, 2025 SB19 to Celebrate 7th Anniversary with “FAST ZONE: A Concert-Fashion Show”. SB19 is set to mark their 7th anniversary with a groundbreaking event — FAST ZONE: A Concert-Fashion Show, the first of its kind for a P-pop group. In collaboration with world-renowned Filipino fashion designer Francis Libiran, the show will combine high-energy performances with a premiere couture collection, creating a unique fusion of music and fashion. The event will took place last October 26, 2025, at the Araneta Coliseum, promising fans an experience that goes beyond trends and sound, redefining style in motion.

Film_title: Gary Numan: 1,000: Live at the Electric Ballroom
Description: On 15 April 2023, Gary Numan marked a monumental milestone in a lengthy career with his 1,000th live performance, at the Electric Ballroom in London’s Camden Town. The show, the last of three sold-out gigs at the iconic venue, was a testament to Numan's enduring influence and the unwavering devotion of his fans. The 1,000th show was more than just a concert; it was a celebration of Gary Numan's remarkable career and his profound impact on electronic and industrial music. With a career spanning multiple decades, Numan continues to push boundaries and inspire generations of musicians. As the final notes of "Are 'Friends' Electric?" faded into the night, it was clear that Gary Numan's unique sonic language will continue to evolve and captivate for years to come.
A genre-bending stop-motion adventure created, voiced, and directed by Matt Garnier. Starring action and Lego figures from the 80s, 90s, and beyond.
found footage

An unmarried police officer, Nishaan Kaur , was appointed by her department to stop the adulteration black market in grocery items . Powerful bhopa sah running adulteration business with political support. Nishaan kaur's parents left her when she was a kid because they didn't want to grow a child . Nishaan kaur's grandfather raised nishaan kaur and helped her to become a police officer .nishana kaur did hard work to winning national athlete . In sports reservation she became police officer. Her grandfather pushed her to get married as soon as possible, but she is involved in cases of criminals all the time.
After suffering a severe attack, Smoke & Lil Smoke were saved by paramedics. Will this father & son embrace the blessing of surviving or seek revenge.
hello hi hi

Fresh out of jail, a woman fights to rebuild her life and mend a broken relationship. But a deadly mistake ties her to a violent past, forcing her to face guilt, consequences, and the harsh truth that some choices can never be undone.

Kevin and Cassandra lost their daughter, Hannah, who died in a freak car accident. While Kevin mourns her death, Cassandra celebrates her life, but bitterness and mutual blame threaten to tear their marriage apart.

After an agonizing school year bruises his relationship with his well-liked older brother Jonah, socially awkward Teddy meets Cole—a disarming boy—by chance on the street. As their friendship deepens, actions begin to speak louder than words, unraveling the fragile balance between brotherhood, belonging, and yearning during a blistering summer break.
DOA Presents Queen of Thorns 2025 from August 9th, 2025 at the Jackson Armory in Portland, OR

Film_title: WarKings: Live at Wacken Open Air
Description: Warkings hit Wacken 2025 with full force, bringing their epic power metal straight from the halls of Valhalla to the festival stage. Since their founding, the band has portrayed themselves as a warrior collective from times long past, bringing their tales of crusaders, Vikings, and legends to musical life. Their current album, "Armageddon," is a storm of thunderous riffs, anthemic choruses, and dramatic theatricality, always accompanied by the mystical voice of Morgana le Fay. Those who appreciate monumental hooks, fierce pathos, and a touch of fantasy will find Warkings a show that oscillates between headbanging ecstasy and battlefield atmosphere, loud, proud, and with swords raised.

Film_title: Peyton Parrish: Live at Wacken Open Air 2025
Description: Peyton Parrish, born in Washington, DC in 1996, has been making waves since 2020 with his blend of country-rock, post-grunge, and Norse-inspired themes. With his viral cover of "My Mother Told Me," known from the series Vikings, he took the scene by storm and established himself as the voice of modern Viking folk-rock. He has released albums such as Cowboy Man (2020), Rise of Vikingr (2022), and most recently Soul (2024), which offer a unique combination of raw emotionality and epic folk sensibility. Songs like "Ragnarök" and "Valhalla Calling" blend Norse mythology with youthful energy, creating a cinematic-inspired soundscape. Peyton writes his own music, streams live on TikTok, and has amassed an enormous following through social media. His stage presence is honest and passionate, an interplay of gentle melodies, powerful hooks and Nordic soul landscapes, with which he touches metal, folk and country fans alike.

Three decades of riffs, sweat, and rock 'n' roll! Orange Goblin celebrate their 30th anniversary in 2025 and simultaneously bid farewell to the stage. What began in London's underground in 1995 has become a British stoner doom institution: heavy, honest, and with tons of groove. Setlist: "Solarisphere", "Scorpionica", "Saruman's Wish", "The Filthy & the Few", "Renegade", "(Not) Rocket Science", "Made of Rats", "Blue Snow", "Hard Luck", "The Devil's Whip", "They Come Back (Harvest of Skulls)", "Quincy the Pigboy", "Red Tide Rising"

Recorded August 1st 2025. Founded in the early 80s, the band, led by guitarist Herman Frank, forged a sound that oscillated between stadium anthems and hard-hitting riffs. Songs like "Never Surrender" and "Don't Tell No Lies" sounded like calls to never lose faith. Decades later, they return to the stage with their tried-and-tested blend of emotion and rock power – more mature, closer, and bigger than ever before. Setlist: "Are You Ready", "Take the Pace", "Rock the Neighbours", "Gods of Tomorrow", "Standing Like a Rock", "Speak Up", "Feel the Fire", "Surrender My Heart", "On the Loose", "Check's in the Mail"

Film_title: Ugly Kid Joe: Live at Wacken Open Air 2025
Description: Ugly Kid Joe are living proof that humor and heavy rock go together wonderfully. With their mix of hard rock, metal, and funk, the Californians created a sound in the early 90s that turned "Everything About You" and their cover version of "Cats in the Cradle" into international hits. They loved poking fun at convention while simultaneously celebrating the great guitar solo. After a few years off, the band returned in 2010 and has since demonstrated that their blend of groove, melodic vocals, and ironic self-irony is timeless. On stage, Ugly Kid Joe come across as a fun-loving gang, celebrating a loud, sweaty party with their audience, and that's exactly what we expect for Wacken 2025.

Claressa Shields, the undefeated and undisputed women’s heavyweight boxing champion, returns to the ring for the second time in 2025 on Saturday, July 26. She will defend her titles against challenger Lani Daniels in the headline bout at Little Caesars Arena in Detroit, Michigan.

Film_title: Frankie Goes To Hollywood: Welcome To The Pleasuredome
Description: Frankie Goes To Hollywood's 1984 double album Welcome To The Pleasuredome Blu-ray features the three UK No 1 singles Relax, Two Tribes and The Power Of Love along with the 12 minute album version of the title track which reached No 2 in 1985, in single form. Other highlights include War, The World Is My Oyster, Born to Run and Black Night White Light. The chart-topping album has been mixed in Dolby Atmos, 5.1 and Stereo by Steven Wilson, all of which feature on the Blu-ray. Unique to this edition are instrumentals of the full album in Atmos, 5.1 and Stereo (also mixed by Steven Wilson). The Blu-ray also features the original 1984 stereo mix of Welcome To The Pleasuredome and offers six bonus tracks (mostly B-sides) in Dolby Atmos, 5.1 and Stereo. Finally, Steven Wilson has created a unique 12-inch mix of the song Welcome To The Pleasuredome, called the 'Supernova' mix. This runs for exactly 30 minutes and like the instrumentals is only available on the Blu-ray.
A family drama based in rural Haryana tells the story of Himmat Singh who brings colors to the lives of his two blind sons

Wind Rose let the thunder of dwarven hammers roll across the festival grounds. Joined by Alea (Saltatio Mortis) for "Diggy Diggy Hole". The Italian power metallers stand out with their Tolkien-inspired lyrics and monumental melodies – they sound as if they'd set the mountains themselves to music. With their viral earworm "Diggy Diggy Hole" and anthemic albums like "Trollslayer," they've enriched the genre with a healthy dose of dwarven epic. Live, they transform the stage into a glittering mine full of folk influences and orchestral power. Anyone who sees them quickly realizes: Wind Rose isn't just about music, but about the pure desire for stories, adventures, and the indomitable power of friends who go into battle together.

👑 A tournament to crown the first-ever Glory Women’s Champion kicks off, featuring: • Gigi Rey • Monica Monroe • Mia Friday • Alejandra Lion PLUS — The Reality of Wrestling Women’s Championship is on the line as Kiah Dream defends against Zayda Steel from WWE ID!

For 2025, Red Bull Hardline returns to Machynlleth in Wales, UK, for what is one of the world's toughest downhill mountain bike races. Riders push their limits to conquer what is known as one of the world's toughest part-downhill, part-freeride mountain bike races. 32 riders will push their limits to conquer a brutal course with massive jumps, drops and technical challenges. Since its inception, world-class trail builder Dan Atherton has levelled up the jumps, gaps and sections, creating a more intense and extreme track for the riders to tackle year on year. Unlike any other MTB course, the Red Bull Hardline UK track borrows elements from motocross and BMX, so as well as speed and stamina, riders will lean heavily on their freeride, dirt jump, and big air skills (think the iconic Road Gap, and over 55ft of airtime).
A triptych that follows an electrician repairing street wires, a road construction on site, and the nostalgia and damnation of animals.

Recorded July 30th 2025. Dogma isn't just a band; they're a ritual. The four frontwomen, Lilith, Lamia, Nixe, and Abrahel, wield heavy riffs, industrial sounds, and dark pop melodies as weapons against ignorance and oppression. Their songs are like incantations: raw, hypnotic, and always with a clear message: "Question everything, including ourselves." Setlist: "Forbidden Zone", "My First Peak", "Made Her Mine", "Carnal Liberation", "Free Yourself", "Like a Prayer", "Bare to the Bones", "Make Us Proud", "The Tribute", "Pleasure From Pain", "Father I Have Sinned", "The Dark Messiah"
A poignant short film exploring the emotional journey of a young cancer patient.

Who can conquer the Iron Giant? Amateurs and high-profile Hard Enduro superstars wrangle over 35km of boulder-strewn terrain and forest ascents during the world's toughest motorcycle race. Only a few will reach the revered finish line.

Film_title: Integrity Sports Entertainment Australia Presents Headstrong
Description: Integrity Sports Entertainment Australia Presents Headstrong

Film_title: Kaskade: Electric Daisy Carnival - Las Vegas - 2025
Description: Kaskade performs under the electric sky at Electric Daisy Carnival (EDC): Las Vegas on May 17, 2025.

Film_title: 60th Annual Academy of Country Music Awards
Description: The 60th Annual Academy of Country Music Awards took place on May 8, 2025, at the Ford Center at The Star in Frisco, Texas. Hosted by Reba McEntire, the show streamed live worldwide on Prime Video. Rising star Ella Langley led with seven nominations and won five awards, while Lainey Wilson earned four wins, including Entertainer of the Year. Country legend Alan Jackson received the inaugural Alan Jackson Lifetime Achievement Award
Two best friends living in a rundown motel struggle to balance the new changes in their lives.

Poor Superior Girl finds herself in a dream dimension where the rules don't apply. The only thing that seems clear is all the Wonderous Women's demand utter compliance and fealty as they force acts and perform unspeakable actions.
Four teenagers film their attempt to capture a ghost.

The dream where no rules apply continues until the witch pulls them out. Inside, Superior Girl has been programmed into a mindless bimbo maid but fails miserably at any work that's requested of her. After they come out of the dream, the witch presents both Wonderous Woman and SG in an interactive art exhibit. The patrons have their fun making life harder for both fallen heroines until finally, a lethal electrical charge ensues.
A documentary following communities in Washington state as they grapple with the potential of "less restrictive alternative" to house sexually violent predators opening in their neighborhoods.

The world's largest urban downhill race returned to Valparaíso in Chile for the 21st time to celebrate the best mountain bike riders from around the globe. There were hair-raising feats in the steep, narrow, twisty streets as they competed in the second stop of the three-part series to determine the ultimate Red Bull Cerro Abajo winner.

Cameras from their regular TV show “Suchmostyle” closely followed the Osaka leg of Suchmos' tour “TOUR THE KIDS” from March to April. All the shows, including additional ones, have been sold out. Don't miss this rare live footage of the band, which is now being called “the hardest band to see live in Japan!

Film_title: Kamasi Washington @ TSF Jazz Chantilly Festival 2025
Description: Brilliant iconoclast Kamasi Washington is one of the most astonishing saxophonists of his generation. Witness a demonstration of his mastery in the enchanting setting of the TSF Jazz Chantilly Festival.

"Myth of the Mother" is a vibrant mix of live-action and animation where lion cub Kibwe narrates African myths, teaching lessons on wisdom, compassion, respect. With humor and heart, it celebrates Africa's animals and timeless stories.
A single mother’s life is sent into a tailspin when her son is kidnapped and held for ransom by a ruthless mobster who wants back his $20 million.
A couple’s first year of happy marriage is challenged when lies, betrayal, and a stranger's baby seem to infiltrate their lives and future plans.
Shpongle Live in Concert (recorded at Mission Ballroom in Denver, Colorado in April 2025)

The adventure movie "Wild Beast 荒野巨獸" tells the story of the year 2100, in the mysterious wilderness and extreme cold forest area, there are primitive deep forests so dense, and ice and snow so cold that dangers hide inside. In this extremely cold wilderness forest land, a meteorite from the planet Garkal 2 with outer space cosmic power fell down on the ground.
TribeQa invites Les Concerts Volants to a daring fusion of African traditions, spellbinding jazz, and energetic hip-hop. A celebration of cultural diversity carried by SUMU, their fourth album.
Los Angeles based singer-songwriter Dylan Chambers performs at the Leverkusener Jazztage festival in Germany and brings all his charm and emotion to the stage.

Conventional is not an option for her. It has to be special. And free. Freedom is the foundation of Emily's songwriting, which recently made her known nationwide—as a resident artist in her hometown and the face of the city of Leverkusen's new pop music promotion program.
A documenteur spends the day with mostly bored people at a strongman competition.
A moving memorial service given by a family who want to honor the dog they loved.

Filmed live on November 1st, 2025, the Marquette High Senior Class presents JUGpocalypse Now! Follow Mr. Kowaleski as he searches for a new assistant dean, all the while he works with shadowy forces to implement new rules. Can the students and teachers fight back?

Film_title: The DVD Openings Movie: The Case of the Mysterious Notes
Description: A home media opener finds himself on a journey to reveal secrets that have intruded his career.

Film_title: We Forgive But We Don't Forget
Description: Following the 1991 Paris Peace Agreements that ended Cambodia’s civil war after the Khmer Rouge genocide, We Forgive but We Don’t Forget asks what comes after peace is signed. The film follows monks, survivors, artists, educators, and community leaders whose quiet, everyday acts of remembrance, resilience, and reconciliation sustain peace beyond the headlines.
An exploration of loneliness, alcohol use, mental illness, artificial intelligence and the LGBTQAI+ community in twenty-first century urban America.
After a crushing betrayal, Sarah spirals into madness-and her fragile grip shatters completely when a shadow returns from her past.
Animation by Veronica Timble

Film_title: The Hellacopters - Live at Wacken Open Air 2025
Description: Setlist : 01. Token Apologies 02. Sometimes I Don't Know 03. Carry Me Home 04. Born Broke 05. Stay With You 06. Toys and Flavors 07. Everything's on T.V. 08. Wrong Face On 09. So Sorry I Could Die 10. By the Grace of God 11. The Devil Stole the Beat From the Lord 12. Baby Borderline 13. Soulseller 14. Leave a Mark 15. In the Sign of the Octopus (The Robots cover) 16. Eyes of Oblivion 17. I'm in the Band 18. (Gotta Get Some Action) Now!
Livestreamed on the Lost Lands Youtube channel.

Musician Gizmo Varillas blends his Spanish roots with British indie spirit. Flamenco, folk, and world music are the unexpected ingredients of his unique pop sound. His songs speak to us of loss, hope, and the courage to make a new start. Since childhood, music has been a way for him to connect with the world. There's no better place than the Reeperbahn Festival Collide to strengthen that bond.
A documenteur films random people in the street, demonstrating how our lives are inextricably linked.

BEYOND SURVIVAL shines a light on the "Domestic Violence Survivors Justice Act," a ground-breaking law that allows sentencing courts to consider the nuanced impact of abuse that contributed to a crime, providing for an alternative to mandatory minimums that perpetuate cycles of criminalization. Featuring survivors freed under the DVSJA law, survivors denied resentencing, campaign leaders, legislators, judges, and activists who spent 10 years advocating for and enacting the law in NY State, the film offers a powerful and consequential lens on the connection that must be made between domestic violence and criminal violence.

Film_title: Blind Guardian Live at Summer Breeze
Description: Blind Guardian are among the most important representatives of power metal. Their epic songs are inspired by fantasy and literary classics. At Summer Breeze 2025, they will deliver a captivating show full of musical virtuosity, epic atmosphere, and legendary metal anthems. Setlist: "The Ninth Wave", "Blood of the Elves", "Nightfall", "Tanelorn (Into the Void)", "Time Stands Still (At the Iron Hill)", "Violent Shadows", "A Past and Future Secret", "Deliver Us From Evil", "Majesty", "The Bard's Song - In the Forest", "And the Story Ends", "Lord of the Rings", "Mirror Mirror", "Valhalla"

In a world where shadows whisper and the unseen is felt, 'Echoes of the Unknown,' investigates and explores the depths of the unexplained--from eerie hauntings and elusive cryptids to mysterious UFO sightings and psychic phenomenon.

Film_title: Kissin Dynamite Live at Summer Breeze 2025
Description: Kissin' Dynamite from Baden-Württemberg combine classic rock elements with a modern sound, catchy melodies, and powerful choruses. With albums like Ecstasy , Not the End of the Road , and Generation Goodbye, they have built a large international fan base and enjoy widespread acclaim far beyond the German rock scene. Frontman Johannes Braun captivates audiences with his charismatic stage presence and direct stage banter. The songs deal with classic rock themes such as freedom, friendship, and exuberant celebration, packaged in catchy melodies and powerful music. Setlist: "Back with a Bang", "DNA", "No One Dies a Virgin", "I've Got the Fire", "My Monster", "Queen of the Night", "The Devil Is a Woman", "Only the Dead", "Not the End of the Road", "You're Not Alone", "Raise Your Glass"

Film_title: Within Temptation Live at Summer Breeze 2025
Description: One of the leading bands in symphonic metal, Within Temptation is masterfully led by singer Sharon den Adel who brings exceptional vocals together with fierce guitar riffs and sumptuous orchestral arrangements. Here, the Dutch band deliver a captivating performance at Summer Breeze, combining dramatic emotion with a multilayered sound. Setlist: "We Go to War", "Bleed Out", "In the Middle of the Night", "Angels", "Faster", "Paradise (What About Us?)", "Stand My Ground", "Wireless", "Supernova", "Don't Pray for Me", "Lost", "The Reckoning", "Ice Queen", "Our Solemn Hour", "Mother Earth"

Film_title: Blutengel: Live at M'era Luna Festival 2025
Description: Since 1998, the Berlin-based band Blutengel has been taking darkwave and electro-gothic to a new level. With dark tracks like "Engelsblut" (Angel's Blood), they captivate their fans. Their performance is more than just music: Chris Pohl and Viki Scarlet transport listeners to a mysterious world through visual experiences, elaborate costumes, and mesmerizing lighting effects. Setlist: "Black", "Lucifer", "Into the Void", "Engelsblut", "Dein Gott", "My Creation", "She Wears Black", "King of Blood", "The Right Path", "Tief", "Reich mir die Hand", "You Walk Away"

Neo-soul, Afrobeat, jazz, and hip-hop... Singer Nneka moves seamlessly between all these styles to speak out against abuse and social injustice. Arriving in Germany at the age of 20, the young Nigerian woman first turned to music to overcome homesickness, before making it the center of her life. Whether lyrical or protest-driven, her singing has one constant: power.

Black and Velvet, two ambitious women who own Black Velvet, an Atlanta bar/restaurant that also supports their liquor store, face a business-threatening crisis. Forced to reinvent their strategy, their creativity sparks a new direction—one that could either carve out a space for their kingdom or cost them everything.

A young neurosurgeon uncovers corruption in spine surgery as a patient's recovery through a laser procedure sparks an investigation exposing bribery, unnecessary fusions, and a medical scandal hurting patients.

Film_title: Trial by Jury - Gilbert and Sullivan
Description: Scottish Opera’s double bill pairs the courtroom comedy, which was the first major success for collaboration between the librettist team of William Schwenck Gilbert and Arthur Sullivan, alongside a new operetta set at the heart of modern British government by Emma Jenkins and Toby Hession.

Singer, guitarist and producer Ana Frango Elétrico is an emblem of the Brazilian indie scene and has made juggling numerous influences her trademark: So much so that her approach has been described as a ‘groovy time machine’. A blend of bossa nova, funk, disco, lounge music and city pop, witness her music electrify the main stage at Nuremberg's Bardentreffen.

Recorded August 1st 2025. Angel Witch are among the defining forces of the New Wave of British Heavy Metal. Founded in London in 1977 by Kevin Heybourne, their debut album "Angel Witch" (1980) set standards. Their performance at Wacken was a tribute to the past and proof that true heavy metal neither ages nor loses its power. Angel Witch deliver legendary songs that remain raw, powerful, and unforgettable. Setlist: Atlantis, Death From Andromeda, Dead Sea Scrolls, White Witch, Sorceress, Dr. Phibes, Angel of Death, Angel Witch
Beenie Man, known as the “King of Dancehall,” is highly regarded internationally. He has collaborated with several stars, including Janet Jackson and Wyclef Jean.

Recorded live at Wacken, August 1st 2025. Forbidden are among the pioneers of Bay Area thrash. Their style is fast, technical, and relentlessly precise. With classics like "Forbidden Evil" and "Twisted into Form," they shaped the sound of an entire genre from the late 80s onward. After a long hiatus, they returned in 2023 with a new singer and renewed energy. Setlist: "Infinite", "Out of Body (Out of Mind)", "March into Fire", "Twisted into Form", "Forbidden Evil", "Divided by Zero", "Step by Step", "Through Eyes of Glass", "Chalice of Blood"

In a society at the height of decadence, where pop stars sing for despots’ birthdays, and even fools can be billionaires, it’s not only the prophets who are kept in cages. There’s one for each of us. In a decaying palace on the edge of the world, everyone is yearning for something to believe in. Sung in English to recapture the shock of Strauss’s scandalous classic, Heartbeat’s intimate new take features a fresh 10-instrument orchestration by Dan Schlosberg of one of Opera’s most extravagant scores.
It's Not the Russian Cyborgs We Have to Worry About

Recorded live at Wacken, July 30th 2025. Apocalyptica began in 1993 as four students playing Metallica songs on their cellos for fun, creating a completely new sound that irrevocably fused classical and metal. Setlist: "Ride the Lightning", "Enter Sandman", "Creeping Death", "For Whom the Bell Tolls", "St. Anger", "The Four Horsemen", "Blackened", "Master of Puppets", "Nothing Else Matters", "Seek & Destroy", "One"

A man walks into a bar to talk about a film. Another man waits to get him to confess. A woman watches to see that he doesn't. Over the course of a long, booze-filled night, everyone is going to say what someone doesn't want to hear.

A man dies mysteriously in the woods. Moments later he is stalking and murdering someone in a completely different environment. Meanwhile, a small group of strangers are stuck in an infinite loop. Is the killer some kind of doppelgänger? Is a mysterious social media "Challenge" responsible for his actions? Is the infinite loop the center of alternate universes taking and sending people randomly to other universes?

Against his family's wishes, a privileged man leaves his home country to experience American culture, but after taking a local job and falling for an opinionated Christian immigrant, he must decide if he is willing to risk his faith, values, and dream of owning a business to reveal his secret past and win her back.

The exploding popularity of Darwinian Evolution has now convinced the majority of young adults to reject the Bible as the Word of God. Kevin Sorbo journeys with John Lennox to explore what we can do to save the ones we love.

A comical, highly infectious, semi-offensive look at what it really means to face the expectations of a small Afrikaans town as a drag queen. The show is packed with personal stories about her days as a head boy, her family, and her experiences within the Afrikaner community; and despite the fact that no one asked for it, Tollie introduces the country to her new “sokkie hit”, Van Hoofseun tot Hoofmeisie
A young man makes one final attempt at the BCS exam while fighting to secure both his future and the love of his life in Shopnoshiri.
In an alternate dystopian reality, a forsaken brotherhood of young men diagnosed with autism embarks on a treacherous journey to get life-saving medication for their caregiver.
When a woman claims to have sighted fae folk on her property an amateur documentarian comes to document the alleged sightings, soon he finds out the fae aren't to be messed with.
A famished man ventures forth into the woods in an effort to calm his hunger.
This story is inspiring by Korean TV Series "Squid Game"

Film_title: Violet Orlandi: Spring at the Raven
Description: Violet Orlandi performs at The Raven, on March 12th 2025. Setlist: "Wicked Game (Chris Isaak)", "My Immortal (Evanescence)", "Kiss From A Rose (Seal)", "Sweet Child Of Mine (Guns N’ Roses)", "Through Glass (Stone Sour)", "Sound Of Silence (Simon & Garfunkel)", "Once Upon a December (Liz Callaway)", "Sweet Home Alabama (Lynyrd Skynyrd)", "Like a Stone (Audioslave)", "Coma White (Marilyn Manson)", "Nemo (Nightwish)", "Narcissistic Cannibal (Korn)", "I Miss the Misery (Halestorm)", "Losing My Religion (R.E.M.)", "Zombie (The Cranberries)", "Square Hammer (Ghost)", "Back To Black (Amy Winehouse)", "Lonely Day (System of a Down)", "Take Me To Church (Hozier)", "Only Holy Water (Violet Orlandi)", "Running Up That Hill (Kate Bush)", "Ghost (Mary On A Cross)"

Kingsley Okorie and Benjamin James, two brothers from Nigeria, combine nostalgia and contempory styles. With influences from highlife, Afrobeat, jazz and soul, they create their very own genre: "Highlife Fusion".
Rising star of German pop and queer icon Cloudy June arrives in Groningen ready to fly the flag for Crazy Woman, her debut album.

Film_title: Haydn: symphonies “The Hours of the Day” Il Giardino Armonico at the Esterházy Palace
Description: “Morning,” “Noon,” “Evening”: a day set to music by Joseph Haydn. Italian conductor Giovanni Antonini and his ensemble Il Giardino Armonico perform the Austrian composer’s symphonic trilogy in the sumptuous Haydn Hall of the Esterházy Palace in Austria, the very place where it was first performed. More than 250 years later, a true alchemy unfolds in this historic setting between the musicians and the three works.

Film_title: Rituel: Boulez & Millepied With Orchestre de Paris L.A Dance Project
Description: Benjamin Millepied and the L.A. Dance Project join forces with Esa-Pekka Salonen and the Orchestre de Paris to celebrate Pierre Boulez through dance. A performance to mark the composer's centenary, followed by works by Stravinsky and Bartók.
Tractor Ted and Midge meet Cammy the shephard, his lambs and the machine that feeds them.
If you ask me what I want to be...? 👑I want to be your queen👑 #Tobeyourqueen What do I need...? What do I have to pay...?

Director: Phwint Theingi Zaw, Pwint Theingi Zaw
Description: What are the most important things for a boy and a girl from the lower classes to fall in love? . . Money or love? 💕

Film_title: Violet Orlandi: Live at The Raven!
Description: Singer and songwriter Violet Orlandi performs live at The Raven! Broadcast November 5th 2025.

Film_title: The Ultimate Guide To Absolutely Everything In The Universe
Description: An ambitious and wildly entertaining journey through, well… everything. From the smallest subatomic particles to the vast expanse of the cosmos, The Ultimate Guide To Absolutely Everything In The Universe breaks down complex ideas with humor, clarity, and a sense of awe. Blending science, philosophy, and curiosity, the video explores how the universe works and what our place in it might mean, making even the most mind-bending concepts feel surprisingly accessible.

Film_title: Julien Doré - Nouvelle tournée des Zéniths
Description: Julien Doré is back, for an even more outrageous show!
JB helps Tractor Ted find blueberries and the amazing machine that harvests them.
Tractor Ted goes to the JCB factory to see the diggers being made.
Tractor Ted visits a farm which makes yummy snacks with hidden fruit.
Midge has a very special Christmas wish... to find the perfect tree for all the presents she has for Tractor Ted, Herb, Meadow and Dibble!

Film_title: The Gift Of Ice: Wild Northern Japan
Description: In Japan's far north, the white plains of Hokkaido bear witness to the cycle of life in its harshest seasons. The lens tells a remarkable tale of glaciers ruling the skies, seals battling the cold and death, and bears reborn as the ice melts. "The Gift of Ice" paints a poetic and realistic picture of the struggle for survival amidst this silent beauty.

Enter a delirious maze of stroboscopic afterlife visions: The Hallucination Zombie Rave Panoptikum merges decayed glamour with ecstatic doom. Bodies move like spirits caught between VHS static and nightclub fog, while basslines resurrect forgotten dreams of delirium. This is not merely an event—it is a séance of sound and spectacle, a surreal carnival where the living and the undead sway together in neon twilight. Step inside the panoptikum and dissolve into the fever.
A group of teen hikers set out on an expedition through the Oregon wilderness for a friend's birthday. as time goes on, things take a sinister turn.
A psychologist must face her mother's history with eating disorders, exposing a generational struggle shaped by love, shame, and the fight to break the cycle.

Description: Setlist : 01. Twilight of the Gods 02. The Grave Dancer 03. Kingdom of Skulls 04. Under My Flag 05. Valhalla 06. The Curse of Jacques 07. The Dark of the Sun 08. The Devils Serenade 09. Back to the Roots 10. Excalibur (with special guest Uwe Lulis (former guitarrist)) 11. Rebellion (The Clans Are Marching) (with special guest Uwe Lulis (former guitarrist) and Jamiro Boltendahl) 12. Heavy Metal Breakdown
Detectives Cora and Liam close in on solving their murder case and rebel against the angels, choosing to take fate into their own hands.

In 1844 Ireland, a rogue falls for a squire's daughter, altering her destiny. Angels send them to present-day Providence Falls to correct it. He must make her fall for another man, though she's now a cop with no memory of their past lives.

Live at Bloodstock, Catton Park, Derbyshire, England, on August 10th 2025. Setlist: "SGFRD Dragonslayer", "Memento Mori", "Untot im Drachenboot", "Bastard von Asgard", "Knightclub", "Ultima Nocte", "Schubsetanz", "Berzerkermode", "Dragostea din tei", "Valhalla"
Detectives Cora and Liam must solve a murder. Meanwhile, despite Liam's hidden love for Cora, he pushes her toward DA Finn Walsh, her fated match, in order to change their destinies.

Ali Siddiq is many things—a master storyteller, a comedy powerhouse—but a handyman? Not even close. In his brand-new special, RUGGED, Ali trades the past gripping tales of his Domino Effect series (40+ million views on YouTube!) for a hilarious deep dive into his current home life, where his DIY attempts go horribly wrong. From botched repairs and general home maintenance failures, to a family that has zero faith in his handyman skills, Ali delivers his signature blend of sharp wit and real-life storytelling. You’re going to laugh, cringe, and feel a little better about your own abilities.

Film_title: A Beacon of Resilience: St. Joseph's Boxing Club
Description: A Beacon of Resilience looks at the young people who train at St. Joseph's Amateur Boxing Club in Newport, and how they were affected by Covid-19 and the lockdowns. St. Joseph's is a storied boxing club that has created many famous Welsh boxers, including Lee Selby, David "Bomber" Pearce, Gary Buckland and Fred Evans. Part of the Co-POWeR project.

Film_title: Underworld: Live at Sydney Opera House
Description: Electronic music legends Underworld returned to the Concert Hall for a euphoric series of sold-out shows during Vivid LIVE 2024. Featuring classic tracks from across their catalogue and never before seen behind-the-scenes footage, this unique concert film showcases why this iconic duo have stood the test of time over the past four decades.

The next release in the ongoing SDE Surround Series of blu-ray audios is Elton John’s Diamonds: The Ultimate Greatest Hits Collection. This best-selling, career-spanning compilation was released back in 2017, to mark 50 years of Elton’s phenomenal songwriting partnership with Bernie Taupin. Kicking off with ‘Your Song’, this definitive collection brings together all the landmark hits of one of the greatest songbooks of all time, including ‘Tiny Dancer’, ‘Rocket Man (I Think It’s Going To Be A Long, Long Time)’, ‘Crocodile Rock’, ‘Daniel’, ‘Candle In The Wind’, ‘Bennie And The Jets’, ‘Don’t Go Breaking My Heart’, ‘I’m Still Standing’, ‘Sacrifice’, ‘Can You Feel The Love Tonight’ and many more. The Diamonds blu-ray contains 51 tracks in hi-res stereo (the same track listing as on the deluxe 3CD set) with 48 of those songs mixed in immersive Dolby Atmos by Greg Penny.

Film_title: The Rolling Stones - Black and Blue

Description: From every wound there is a scar and every scar tells a story. A young woman tries everything in her power to escape her nightmarish marriage, but discovers it is impossible to elude her controlling and obsessive husband.

Film_title: Roberto Benigni: Pietro - Un uomo nel vento
Description: Roberto Benigni's monologue dedicated to the life of St. Peter: a unique event held in the heart of Vatican City to celebrate the Jubilee.
Different people seek solace from a professional hugger

Film_title: Be Careful What You Wish for ('Cause You Might Just Get It)
Description: A group of actors gathers to shoot a low-budget horror short, documenting the process mockumentary-style. When a sacred method-acting chant is invoked to "raise the stakes," the goth geeks unexpectedly gain metaphysical power.

The Route 66 Swing Band returned to the stage to kick off the holiday season with their highly anticipated annual Winter Concert, bringing a lively mix of classic big band swing and festive yuletide cheer to the East Bay.

Film_title: Chabot Holiday Big Band Jazz Concert
Description: The Chabot College Music Department celebrated the winter season with its flagship annual holiday showcase, bringing an evening of high-energy, hard-swinging big band jazz and festive cheer to the East Bay. Ellona Santiago: The powerhouse Filipino-American vocalist and San Lorenzo native returned to the Chabot stage to front the big band. Widely recognized for her standout run on Season 3 of The X Factor USA (where she finished 6th overall under the mentorship of Demi Lovato), Santiago brought her dynamic vocal range and soulful energy to a selection of holiday classics and jazz standards. April Absynth: The versatile vocalist, recording artist, and actress brought her immense dramatic presence and smooth vocal delivery back to the Chabot stage. Widely recognized for her series-regular role as Jacque on the TV series Blindspotting and her extensive leading theatrical work, she added a stellar layer of star power and storytelling to the festive setlist.

He returns to Nigeria with a wealthy woman he's secretly using for money. But back home, he has a wife and family hidden in plain sight. To keep the lies going, he introduces his wife as his sister, and the whole family plays along.
Zo confronts betrayal within his crew while plotting his final score. Amidst loved ones, he grapples with harsh realities of loyalty in Houston's underworld, where trust is rare.

Film_title: Brothers of Metal - Metal Hammer Paradise 2025
Description: Brothers of Metal played Metal Hammer Paradise 2025 on November 28th, featuring a powerful setlist including fan favorites like "Warriors Assemble," "Prophecy of Ragnarök," and "Defenders of Valhalla". They shared the stage with bands like Apocalyptica and Rhapsody of Fire at the German festival. Setlist: Fimbulvinter, Prophecy of Ragnarok, Njord, Ride of the Valkyries, Sowilo, Flight of the Ravens, Hel, Concerning Norns + Yggdrasil, The Other Son of Odin, To the Skies and Beyond, Defenders of Valhalla.
Short film by Varun Kishore.

Film_title: Iron Savior - Live at Metal Hammer Paradise
Description: Filmed on November 28, 2025 at Weissenhäuser Strand, Germany, at Metal Hammer Paradise 2025. Piet Sielck and his bandmates promise an unforgettable evening, tailor-made for headbanging and adrenaline. A pillar of the German power metal scene since 1996, Iron Savior has forged a sonic universe at the crossroads of science fiction and genre traditions. Blending futuristic concepts, powerful riffs, and melodic vocals, the band crafts tracks of rare intensity. Setlist: Way of the Blade, Roaring Thunder, Starlight, Souleater, In the Realm of Heavy Metal, Hall of the Heroes, Together as One, Heavy Metal Never Dies, Condition Red, Atlantis Falling, Revenge of the Bride
Following their mother's funeral, two polar opposite sisters evaluate whether or not to stay a part of each other's lives.

Rufat Agayev’s debut comedy special, The Bad Rufat, captures the magic of his unique journey. He’s a featured writer in the HarperCollins-published anthology Alien Nation, host of Joe Pera’s favorite NYC show, Scorpion Records Comedy Night, and has appeared on The Adam Friedland Show, Stavvy’s World, and has a taped set with Don’t Tell Comedy

Film_title: MUPANI x Kelvin Jones - Reeperbahn Festival Collide 2025

Description: Anna and Joel Kemp's joy over their expected baby is shattered when Anna's cancer returns. They face an agonizing decision: pursue treatment now or delay it, with either the mother's or unborn child's life at stake.
One Night Im Miami Zaydon host a Party with his Friends what he did not know is everything will start to go south

Sonya Yoncheva plays Dido, the queen in love betrayed by fate, while Halidou Nombre gives voice to the passions of Aeneas, torn between his love and the call of Rome, who is caught up in an intrigue hatched by dark forces. Sonya Yoncheva incarne Didon, la reine amoureuse trahie par le destin, tandis qu’Halidou Nombre donne voix aux passions d’Énée, déchiré entre son amour et l’appel de Rome, et entraîné dans une intrigue ourdie par des forces obscures.

Laurel & Hardy: Year Three brings to Blu-ray disc nine of L&H's most beloved classic shorts, newly restored and joined by a host of rare archival material that also includes several of their earliest sound films. Unparalleled in their ability to adapt to the changing cinematic landscape, Laurel and Hardy’s upwards trajectory was only bolstered by the arrival of sound. Their first sound short, appropriately titled Unaccustomed As We Are, begins to incorporate sync sound gags and was so well received by audiences that the duo would go on to win the Academy Award for The Music Box just a few years later, an impressively rare feat for the time.

Film_title: Face the Music: A Tribute to ELO’s Richard Tandy
Description: RBC students, former members of ELO and Big Horizon come together to pay tribute to iconic ELO keyboardist Richard Tandy in this unique event celebrating Richard’s contribution to the band.
After a global disappearance event, survivors struggle with faith, fear, and trust. As rumors of a protected refuge spread, they must decide who to believe in a world forever changed.
WAR Wrestling presents: Winter Warz Bradfield Community Center, Lima, OH Saturday, December 6th, 2025

In this alternative Red Dead world, Arthur Mainwaring, the son of welsh activist Sam Mainwaring, decide to try his luck in Saint-Denis after years of doubts working the mines in Annesburg. Even in the toughest of times, he find camaraderie to unite and attempt to live free.

Film_title: Chabot Jazz Combo Concert featuring Richard Conway
Description: The Chabot College Music Department kicked off its Fall 2025 concert series with an intimate, improvisation-focused evening showcasing the department's small jazz ensembles. Richard Conway: Bringing years of professional experience, veteran trumpet player and educator Richard Conway joined the student combos on stage. Known for his warm tone, lyrical melodic phrasing, and deep roots in the classic bop tradition, Conway integrated seamlessly into the small-group format, trading solos and mentoring the young musicians in real-time.

After a botched session with a spirit board (paper), a group of teenagers must save their friend from demonic possession. And to make matters worse, the demon has one goal in mind: Kill six humans to open a portal to Hell. Will the unlikely heroes vanquish the demon, or will evil triumph? Attend “One Hell of a Party” to find out.
LSZEE's live set at Lost Lands 2025.

A young aviator engineer, Hryhorii Mnogogrishnyi, escapes from a train carrying prisoners to a Siberian concentration camp. After struggling to survive in the wild, Hryhorii finds refuge in the Sirki family, Ukrainian immigrants who live in harmony with nature and hunt tigers. Here Hryhorii finds shelter and love. But the NKVD (People's Commissariat of Internal Affairs) is out on the scent for the blood of the young engineer, leading to a deadly duel.
A day in the life of a PSW

Film_title: Power Pro Lucha: Chrono Trios Night Two
Description: “If history is to change, let it change.” A two-night lucha extravaganza. A tournament steeped in tradition. A celebration of Trios wrestling unlike any other. Eight revered teams have been invited to compete in Power Pro Lucha’s inaugural Triple Tech Trials. Which of these teams has the drive, the will, and the Power to emerge victorious, and become the first-ever Power Pro Lucha Triple Tech Trials winners?

Eight stories. One wasteland. From the ruins of civilization come nightmares of survival, horror, and the unknown. Tales from the Wasteland is a cinematic anthology of post-apocalyptic short films — featuring zombies, mutants, alien invaders, and survivors on the edge of humanity. Each film explores a different vision of the end of the world, stitched together in a relentless descent into chaos. This is not just the apocalypse… these are the tales it left behind.

A boy with powers must protect himself and his friend from a villain born from his mistakes. When Spooder-Kid and his friend Vincent find out about him they are put in a difficult place to be-weather to save the world themselves or leave it up to somebody else. Spooder-Kid must stop the Bubbler before he goes through with his master plan.
