Film_title: Elephant Revival at Telluride Bluegrass Festival
Description: The legendary Colorado-based folk band Elephant Revival is known for their ethereal harmonies, incredible musicality, and haunting sound. And after a four-year hiatus, they reunited in 2023 and graced the stage of Telluride Bluegrass Festival in 2024 – one of the most beautiful places in the world.

Film_title: Charlotte Wessels - Live at Dynamo Metalfest
Description: Charlotte Wessels and her band perform at IJssportcentrum, Eindhoven, Netherlands, on August 16th 2024. Setlist: Chasing Sunsets, Dopamine, Ode to the West Wind, The Crying Room, Vigor and Valor (with Elianne Anemaat), Breathe (with Elianne Anemaat), Praise, Soft Revolution (with Elianne Anemaat), The Exorcism (with Elianne Anemaat)

Film_title: Wind Rose Live at Summer Breeze
Description: The Italian band Wind Rose thrills audiences with epic power metal inspired by fantasy worlds. Known for anthemic songs like "Diggy Diggy Hole," powerful choruses, and high-energy shows, they guarantee a fantastic atmosphere. Wind Rose from Italy have established themselves as a major force in epic power metal. Their music is heavily inspired by fantasy worlds, particularly the culture and stories of dwarves, which is reflected in their lyrics, melodies, and stage outfits inspired by fantasy dwarf worlds. Setlist: "Dance of the Axes", "Fellows of the Hammer", "Drunken Dwarves", "Gates of Ekrund", "Mine Mine Mine!", "Rock and Stone", "Together We Rise", "Diggy Diggy Hole (The Yogscast cover)", "I Am the Mountain"

Film_title: Fiddler's Green Live at Summer Breeze
Description: The German band Fiddler's Green stands for high-energy, feel-good Irish speedfolk. Their blend of traditional Irish sounds, punk rock elements, and fast rhythms thrills fans worldwide. At Summer Breeze 2025, they'll deliver a captivating show where dancing, partying, and singing along are guaranteed. A highlight for all fans of Irish music and fast-paced folk rock. Setlist: "Shanghaied in Portsmouth", "A Night in Dublin", "Down", "Bottoms Up", "A Good Old Irish Bar", "The Bog", "Tobi Solo", "Raise Your Arms", "Yindy", "Victor and His Demons", "One Fine Day", "The Night Paddy Murphy Died"

Film_title: Oscar and the Wolf: Live at Tomorrowland 2025
Description: Oscar and the Wolf live at Tomorrowland July 20, 2025.

Acer Day 2025 held on August 9, 2025 at the SM Mall of Asia Arena. The event, themed “Break A Limit”, is a celebration of Filipino music and artistry, featuring performances by Acer ambassadors SB19, G22, and Sarah Geronimo, along with Itchyworms, KMKZ, and Maki. The event will also debut the new Acerpure ambassadors from the PBB Celebrity Collab housemates.

Film_title: Die Apokalyptischen Reiter: Live at Wacken 2025
Description: When Die Apokalyptischen Reiter (THE RIDERS OF THE APOCALYPTIC) take the stage at Wacken, a storm of energy, pathos, and sheer joy of playing unfolds, transcending conventional metal categories. For almost three decades, the band from Weimar has stood for musical versatility and an explosive live presence that takes no prisoners. Setlist: "Spoken Word Intro", "Volle Kraft", "Wilde Kinder", "Es wird schlimmer", "Der Weg", "Die Boten", "Vier Reiter stehen bereit", "Friede sei mit dir", "Die Sonne scheint", "Auf und Nieder", "The Great Experience of Ecstasy", "Rache an der Wirklichkeit", "Seemann", "Nach der Ebbe", "Reitermania"

Recorded live on August 2nd 2025. Crownshift were formed in 2022 and are the brand new band featuring vocalist Tommy Tuovinen (MyGrain), guitarist and vocalist Daniel Freyberg (ex-Children Of Bodom, ex-Bodom After Midnight), bassist Jukka Koskinen (Nightwish, Wintersun), and drummer Heikki Saari (Finntroll). Setlist: If You Dare, The Devil's Drug, Rule the Show, A World Beyond Reach, Black Velvet, My Prison, Mirage, Stellar Halo, Paint the Sky With Blood

Film_title: The Boomtown Rats: Live at Wacken
Description: The Boomtown Rats are among the great voices of the British punk and new wave era, formed in Dublin in 1975 around Bob Geldof. With songs like "Rat Trap" and the worldwide hit "I Don't Like Mondays," they made music history—biting, melodic, and socially critical. After a long hiatus, they returned in 2013 and have since proven that taking a stand is timeless. Their current chapter combines classics with fresh energy, especially for their 50th anniversary. At Wacken, on August 1st 2025, they brought their rebellious mix of rock, punk, and new wave to the stage, as a reminder that good protest always needs a damn strong chorus. Setlist: "Rat Trap", "(I Never Loved) Eva Braun", "Like Clockwork", "Neon Heart", "(She's Gonna) Do You In", "Someone's Looking at You", "I Don't Like Mondays", "Against the World", "She's So Modern", "Diamond Smiles", "The Boomtown Rats"

Annisokay stand for a powerful blend of modern metalcore, catchy melodies, and emotional depth – and that's exactly what they brought to Wacken on August 2nd 2025. Between shouts and clean vocals, between brutal riffs and anthemic hooks, magnificent songs forge their way to the listener. Frontman Rudi Schwarzer and singer/guitarist Christoph Wieczorek complement each other perfectly, forming a wall of sound that cuts deep and resonates long after the last note fades. Live, Annisokay don't deliver a run-of-the-mill show, but rather intense moments oscillating between loss of control and clarity. For everyone who's looking for more than just noise, but still doesn't want to sacrifice volume. Setlist: Throne of the Sunset, Never Enough, Ultraviolet, Like a Parasite, Human, My Effigy, Inner Sanctum, Good Stories, H.A.T.E., Calamity, Coma Blue, STFU

Majestica made their festival debut at Wacken on August 2nd 2025. Majestica are bringing symphonic power metal back into the spotlight at full speed, and quite literally. Originally founded as ReinXeed, the band, fronted by singer and guitarist Tommy Johansson, also known to many as a member of Sabaton, has become a flagship of epic metal drama. Their sound is reminiscent of Helloween, Rhapsody, or Stratovarius, while always remaining unique and energetic. Anyone looking for the ultimate power metal highlight will definitely find it here. Setlist: "Power Train", "Night Call Girl", "Thunder Power", "Rising Tide", "No Pain, No Gain", "A Story in the Night", "Above the Sky", "Metal United", "Alliance Forever"

Film_title: Brothers Of Metal Live at Wacken 2025
Description: Recorded August 1st, 2025. Brothers of Metal are the epic power metal warriors straight from Falun, Sweden, armed with guitars, myths, and a hefty dose of self-irony. With three singers, bombastic choirs, and anthems like "The Other Son of Odin" and "Berserkir," they celebrate Norse gods, battles, and legends in such an exaggerated way that it all comes across as genuinely serious. Setlist: "Fimbulvinter", "Prophecy of Ragnarök", "Njord", "Ride of the Valkyries", "Flight of the Ravens", "Hel", "Yggdrasil", "To the Skies and Beyond", "Defenders of Valhalla"

Film_title: Dominum Live at Wacken Open Air
Description: Dominum have dedicated themselves body and soul to zombie metal. In 2023, they emerged from the darkness like the undead. Led by frontman Dr. Dead and his morbid bandmates, they performed at Wacken on August 1st 2025. Their songs are a blend of heavy riffs, theatrical bombast, and horror-movie romance; their shows resemble a rock opera with undead patients, surgical costumes, and a healthy dose of dark humor. Setlist: Danger Danger, Killed by Life, The Dead Don't Die, Frankenstein, The Guardians of the Night, Hey Living People, We Are Forlorn, One of Us, Don't Get Bitten by the Wrong Ones, Rock You Like a Hurricane, We All Taste the Same, The Chosen Ones, Immortalis Dominum

Drowning Pool are among the primal forces of early 2000s nu-metal. With their debut album "Sinner" and the still-iconic hit "Bodies," they burst onto the scene in 2001 like a wrecking ball. The sudden death of charismatic singer Dave Williams just a year later shook the band to their core, but they decided to carry on. After several vocal changes, Ryan McCombs returned in 2023, his voice having already graced the albums "Full Circle" and "Drowning Pool." Setlist: "Sinner", "Feel Like I Do", "Step Up", "Enemy", "Sermon", "Pity", "Tear Away", "Bodies"

Recorded August 1st 2025 at Wacken Open Air. SETYØURSAILS from Cologne are one of the most exciting voices in modern melodic metalcore. Since 2017, they've been shaking up the scene with uncompromising energy, emotional depth, and a clear stance. Frontwoman Jules Mitch captivates with her powerful voice and genuine stage presence. Setlist: "Mirror", "Nightfall", "Why", "In My Head", "Bad Company", "Break Stuff", "Fckoff", "Bad Blood", "Dangerous", "Halo", "Best of Me"

Kayleen is a nice and cute 14-year-old girl, along with her friends, the Animaniacs, who love to get totally insane, silly, and funny, even with Pinky and the Brain, and loves to be with Kayleen and lives in New York with Kayleen. Kayleen and Animaniacs are on a mission with the Little Einsteins, Sherrie, Brianna, Twilight, Super Javier Logan, the Vyonders 5 and the rest of her friends, and Kayleen and Animaniacs have special powers along with her friends and Kayleen, Animaniacs and her team gonna save the day and help people, saving New York/Vyond City and care about each other Animaniacs is staying in Kayleen's house forever and Kayleen is happy about it.

A majestic symbol of the wild, the gazelle makes its way through the forest, facing nature's challenges. From its first steps to its first battles, from frightening accidents to majestic victories, this film documents its unique journey through the wild. Capturing every detail without restriction, we follow the king's imprint on the depths of the forest.
Welcome to purgatory. Where will your journey take you?

Film_title: Katie & Erika Throw the Perfect Father’s Day Party
Description: Katie and Erika are going to throw the perfect Father's Day party. Yes, both of their dads are dead. But that doesn't mean we can't live for today! Following their sold-out valentine's day event (now available here as bonus content!) and produced by Laser Webber (Laservision Productions)—you can expect improv games and a long-form set from Dropout favorites, an educational presentation, and special meet-and-greets with your new dad!

Betrayals, secrets, and hidden ambitions threaten to destroy the dynasty that once reigned with an iron fist over the world of drug trafficking. In this blood war, only one will be able to inherit the throne.

Experience Pearl Jam's Binaural like never before. In honor of the 25th anniversary of the album, dive into its world with the spatial audio blu-ray. Feel every note and lyric of tracks like “Light Years” and “Nothing As It Seems” wrap around you in a way that's beyond amazing. Whether you're reliving the memories or discovering it anew, it's time to let the music take over.

Film_title: Chabot Salsa Jazz Concert with Andy Martin
Description: Chabot College closed out its Spring 2025 semester instructions with an explosive, rhythm-heavy night of Afro-Cuban rhythms and Latin jazz at the Performing Arts Center, featuring one of the industry's most prolific brass players. Andy Martin: One of the most in-demand trombonists in the music business, Martin brought his world-class technique and virtuosity to the East Bay. A prominent Los Angeles studio legend, his extensive resume includes playing lead trombone for Gordon Goodwin's Big Phat Band, appearing on soundtracks for over 150 major motion pictures, and anchoring the brass section on hit TV shows like Dancing With The Stars and American Idol.

Film_title: Power Pro Lucha: A Link to the Past
Description: Experience the spectacle with Power Pro Lucha once again as we return for our second showing in The City of Brotherly Love on May 25, 2025! What will the fallout be from reGeneration? What will the response from The Xyberhawx be in regard to the mauling they received from Poisynhawk? What of Max Zero and his losing streak? And what could The Spectral Envoy possibly want with Matt Mako?

The Route 66 Swing Band took the stage on Tuesday, May 20, 2025 for their annual Spring Concert at the Castro Valley Center for the Arts, delivering a vibrant night of nostalgic big band classics, jump blues, and timeless standards.

Miss Universe Philippines 2025 was the sixth edition of the Miss Universe Philippines pageant, held at the SM Mall of Asia Arena in Pasay, on May 2, 2025. It was the first pageant held under the national directorship of Ariella Arida.

A queer woman, Iris, is struggling to connect with her peers in a very heterosexual environment. Feeling left out after everyone around her finds their partner, Iris believes it is finally her turn. When she starts falling for a girl in Ballroom Dance Club, Iris gains the slightest bit of hope that things might turn around for the better. Despite yearning for a romantic relationship, she learns what she truly needs is a friend who understands what she is going through.
A girl remembers her lost brother.

In 1903 a disinherited high Society female orphan searches desperately for her true identity and discovers her new purpose after her ex-fiance ships her off to a small town in Missouri to be a house servant.
After her unruly brother is suspended from school, a taciturn sister agrees to take him on a journey to find a rare collectible card

Invitations have gone out to a deliberately curated roster of Power Players—names like UltraMantis Black, Hallowicked, Frightmare, Cheeseburger, F.I.S.T., The Xyberhawx, The Outfielders, and more will be entering the fray! Kenn Kington finds the funny in life’s everyday moments—marriage quirks, parenting adventures, and roadwork woes. He turns real-life experiences into nonstop laughs. Get ready for a stand-up show full of heart and hilarity!

Film_title: Chabot Jazz Band Concert with Dan Fornero
Description: The Chabot College Jazz Department hosted a high-energy evening of big band jazz at the Chabot College Performing Arts Center on Thursday, March 13, 2025, featuring elite industry veteran Dan Fornero. Dan Fornero: A Grammy Award-winning trumpeter known for his blistering lead playing and extensive commercial resume. Fornero has performed and recorded with industry giants like Gordon Goodwin's Big Phat Band, Tom Jones, Neil Diamond, and Phil Collins, as well as playing on numerous major film and television scores.

Film_title: Katie and Erika Throw The Perfect (Valentine’s Day) Party
Description: This Valentine’s Day, Erika Ishii and Katie Marovitch are inviting their friends to a holiday party that will be perfect. You’ll see Aabria Iyengar and Erika talk about MonsterLoving, see a RANK ROOM revival, and enjoy some longform improv from and incredible all-star cast!!

Drawing on the experiences of undocumented migrants, KARMA explores the emotional and moral dilemmas they face and ultimately celebrates the transformative power of truth and compassion. This Nollywood drama, filmed in Frankfurt, Benin City, and Lagos, revolves around themes such as love, deception, justice, and redemption.
Derrick (8) tries to put the pieces of his childhood back together when diagnosed with cancer.

Film_title: Rich Wilson: The Train, The Story And The Bump
Description: Newly married and with a baby on the way, Rich Wilson was looking forward to this new, exciting chapter in his life and then he met a mysterious woman in black on a London bound train who changed his worldview completely. Join Rich as he tells you the harrowing yet hilarious story of The Train, The Story And The Bump!
